programme.title: Movie: Forever in My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs - back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Goes Nanners
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag is racist enflames the entire town, including the kids.

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman form their own boy band, 'Fingerbang,' and search for a fifth member. It is also Carman's latest scheme to make a million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?
programme.desc: The boys become obsessed with religion and redemption after they're scared by a sermon about Hell. Meanwhile, Saddam returns to Hell and tries to have Satan's new boyfriend 'taken care of.'

programme.title: South Park: Probably
programme.desc: When their church's answers aren't sufficient to sate the boys' fear, they break off from their church and Cartman takes on the role of evangelical preacher. Meanwhile in Hell, the feud between Chris and Saddam continues.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp
programme.desc: Cartman's family and friends stage an intervention, and force him to trim down. While Cartman's away, Kenny's star is on the rise when he gets his own reality TV show.

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure
programme.desc: To get back at his parents for not letting him go to a concert, Kyle tells the police that his parents molested him. Soon, the whole town is free of adults and divided into two rival factions.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmanland
programme.desc: Cartman inherits a million dollars from his grandmother and fulfills his lifelong dream of owning his own amusement park: Cartmanland. Meanwhile, Kyle is aghast at Cartman getting his dreams, and renounces his faith.

programme.title: South Park: It Hits the Fan
programme.desc: When the HBC Network allows a show to utter curse words on the air, it threatens to destroy the world. It's up to the Knights of Standards and Practices, as well as Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny, to censor the airwaves and save the world.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back. There is also a new dysfunctional character in South Park who tries to recruit the boys to his cause.

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt
programme.desc: Cartman gets Kenny's school picture on every 'missing child' milk carton in the country. Cartman then sees the funniest thing ever and breaks his funny bone, losing his sense of humour.

programme.title: South Park: The Entity
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device. Meanwhile, Kyle tries to ditch his cousin, also named Kyle, who comes to South Park for an extended visit.

programme.title: South Park: Here Comes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Token is tired of being the only rich kid in town, and succeeds in attracting several other wealthy families to South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Very Own Episode

programme.title: South Park: Freak Strike
programme.desc: When the boys learn that talk shows offer prizes to people who are grossly disfigured they can't sign Butters up fast enough.

programme.title: South Park: Jared Has Aides
programme.desc: As the country becomes obsessed with a popular program for losing weight, the boys see an opportunity to become sponsored by a local restaurant.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.

programme.title: South Park: Red Hot Catholic Love
programme.desc: A sexual abuse scandal involving Catholic priests hits South Park and is taken all the way to the Vatican.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of the Fellowship of the Ring to the Two Towers
programme.desc: The boys embark upon a mythical quest as they set out to return their copy of the 'The Lord of the Rings' movie to the Two Towers video store. Unknown to them, they are really carrying the most degraded porno ever made.

programme.title: South Park: Death Camp of Tolerance
programme.desc: The boys are sentenced to the Death Camp of Tolerance where they learn how to treat minorities. Mr Garrison's new boyfriend, Mr. Slave, and the heroic gerbil, Lemmiwinks, make their debut.

programme.title: South Park: I'm a Little Bit Country
programme.desc: The boys join some anti-war protesters because it's a free pass out of school for the day. Meanwhile, it's the right vs. the left when the town is split between different opinions on war.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Unabomber
programme.desc: Writing style reveals Unabomber's identity when Ted Kaczynski's sister-in-law recognizes his phrasing in his manifesto.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: The Siege at Waco
programme.desc: The siege at the Branch Davidian compound in Waco, Texas leads to 80 deaths, and the debacle captures America's attention and changes the ATF and the FBI.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: The Explosion (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1995, Timothy McVeigh, a 26-year-old U.S. army veteran, detonated a truck bomb outside a federal building in Oklahoma City. We take a look back at the events that led up to the largest domestic terrorist attack in the history of the United States.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: McVeigh's Shocking Confession (Part 2)
programme.desc: In an exclusive prison interview, Timothy McVeigh himself describes how events in his personal life and the world around him inspired him to kill his fellow Americans. We also hear from survivors of the bombing and family members of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Snitch Work
programme.desc: A 4-year-old girl is found murdered, her body placed in a TV box. Years later, a neighbour is arrested for the crime. When an author seeking to write about the death penalty comes across the case, he finds an investigation filled with holes.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Boy's Story
programme.desc: A money order salesman is brutally murdered and two teenage brothers and their best friend are arrested. They spend almost four decades behind bars, until a journalist takes notice of the case and uncovers evidence of the men’s innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: The wife and two children of an Air Force captain are murdered in Fayetteville, North Carolina, and Army sergeant Tim Hennis is sentenced to death for the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Army vet Joe D'Ambrosio is sentenced to death for a 1988 murder. No one listened to his pleas of innocence until Father Neil Kookoothe began investigating the case and discovered a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Paris
programme.desc: Newlyweds are murdered in a small town in Illinois and a local barfly is quickly sent to death row for the crime.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Rain of Terror
programme.desc: A mother and an adventure addict enter the cloud forest of Ecuador and encounter unbearably wet conditions, lightning, cabin fever, trench foot and finger-slicing machetes during their 21-day challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Burnt to a Crisp
programme.desc: Tormented by hostile crocodiles, territorial howler monkeys and no tree canopy to protect them from the sun in this post-hurricane Nicaraguan jungle, one survivalist suffers third-degree sunburn while the other's life is threatened by a mystery illness.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: What the Duck?
programme.desc: In Mexico's unforgiving, cenote-covered landscape, two fan survivalists are dropped on an island filled with venomous coral snakes, territorial jaguars, blood-sucking chiquistas and a duck named Henry that they desperately want to eat for dinner.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Spirits Are Angry
programme.desc: A haunted Colombian rainforest punishes the survivalists with threats from deadly jaguars, 300 species of snakes and relentless biting insects. However, their challenge is threatened when they don't heed the curse of the jungle.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Anaconda River Rapids
programme.desc: Naked survivalists are challenged to survive in harsh and dangerous environments.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Six survivalists journey to predator-filled Africa and must fend off lions and hyenas before their 21 days are up.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Strength in Pain
programme.desc: An adventuress and a wilderness instructor take on the Honduras rainforest. They survive punishing storms and frigid nights, but a terrifying, close encounter with a deadly snake brings this pair to the breaking point.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Grady and Bill are dropped onto a glacial volcanic peak in the Chilean Andes, where they face 70 mph winds, heavy snowfall, and sub-freezing temperatures. Hunkering down in cave shelters, they risk noxious gases and struggle to get fire.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Long Way Home
programme.desc: Stranded in Chile, Grady and Bill struggle to get fire in the damp rainforest, setting ego and survival protocol on a collision course that tests this new team. Only a successful primitive fire and hunt can reset the clock on their survival.

programme.title: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A monster named Champ is believed to live in Lake Champlain. Investigators use the latest technology to find out whether the creature really exists.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: One Way or Another

programme.title: Progressive Bass Wrap Up Show: 2019 FLW Cup!
programme.desc: Coverage and behind-the-scenes footage of the FLW Cup from Hot Springs, Arkansas.

programme.title: Raised Hunting: Anything
programme.desc: Warren tries to build the best hunting app ever while trying to fill his Iowa bow tag.

programme.title: The Given Right: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Mark chases an old warrior known as the Enchanted 9 in his home state of Iowa.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Exposed
programme.desc: The Underdog BBQ team races to prepare for their opening day, but when Glenn accidentally reveals his true identity to a team member, it puts the entire business and the bet in jeopardy.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: Glenn sinks everything into Underdog BBQ's big debut and first chance to make money. But before the cash register even opens, the team's plan goes up in flames, threatening the future of the company before the 90-day deadline.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Abandoned and Alone
programme.desc: In Montana, the Raneys help Beth and Mike Ettinger who live in an abandoned ghost town where many previous homesteaders failed. Survival is a battle on this homestead that is stalked by a mountain lion and void of any livestock, water or food.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Poisoned
programme.desc: The Raneys build the Rains a hillside garden, turn a cave into a goat fortress, and find uncontaminated water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Under Siege
programme.desc: The Raneys attempt to help the Zabec family in Virginia. With pigs destroying the homestead, predators killing livestock and a huge oak threatening their cabin, the Raneys must convince them that their free-range dream is killing their homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Bears and the Bees
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Marty bush-engineers a windmill to pump water to a new bathhouse, but the dangerous North Carolina wind threatens progress.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Bearanoia
programme.desc: The Raneys rush to a failing homestead in Colorado where they find husband Don makes a 40-mile mountain commute each day, leaving his wife alone, terrified to leave the house because it's surrounded by bears and mountain lions.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Cattle Drive
programme.desc: Otto and Elvin head out in the middle of the night to rescue a missing calf. Atz Lee and Jane build a makeshift greenhouse.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Fool's gold

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Jenny is devastated when she hears shocking news about Sumit. Laura is torn between Liam and Aladin. Corey is conflicted about returning to Evelin in Ecuador. Paul's mother arrives in Brazil. Tiffany is worried about giving birth in South Africa.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Bridesmaid Meltdown

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Grave Diagnosis
programme.desc: A teenage girl is impaled through the neck on an iron fence; a patient is convinced he's turning into a vampire; to save the life of a critically ill pregnant woman, a first-year attending physician has to stand up to a room full of senior specialists.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rattled
programme.desc: A snake bite victim may die in the ER when life-saving anti-venom isn't available; a mother is near death after having a C-section and doctors are torn over treatment options.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Foreign Objects
programme.desc: The ER becomes a crime scene when a woman is brought in with intense belly pain; a doctor is mystified by heart attacks occurring the same day in the same family; strange markings on the body of a car crash victim lead to the cause of the accident.

programme.desc: Lela doesn't know what she wants and Christiane gets nervous about finding something.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Big Budget Brides
programme.desc: Monisha has come looking for a dress for her three wedding ceremonies. Mary has a budget of thirty thousand dollars to buy two dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Expecting Brides
programme.desc: Tisa's looking for a dress that makes her look hot even though she's three months pregnant. Victoria is six months pregnant and looking for a dress for her wedding just eight weeks away.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Rocker Brides

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More Than a Wedding
programme.desc: Cheryl has recently beaten breast cancer and had her last reconstructive surgery a week ago. Jennifer is battling a rare kidney disease, and Kristin is overcoming stage four lung cancer. For these brides, their weddings are a celebration of love and life.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Brides and Their Boys
programme.desc: Dana is shopping with her two bridesmen for an edgy wedding dress. Akisha brings her fiancé's best man to her appointment to represent her husband's opinion.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Performances Piece

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dad's Being Dadzilla

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You ARE a Daredevil!
programme.desc: Paralympic snowboarder Amy Purdy isn't afraid to take risks, like waiting to find her dress just three weeks before the big day. Katie is the ultimate planner and brings a list ranking her top gowns.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That's How You Dress a Lady

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A 16-year-old environmentalist has an eco-friendly way to say goodbye to plastic bottles. Then, a former soap star villainess wants the Sharks to make a deal with her one-piece swimsuit that can keep you sun-safe and stylish.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fed Up/ Shell Shock
programme.desc: The kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby, but Lincoln doesn't trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family, they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roadie to Nowhere/ A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Mad Scientist/ Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: Present Tense/ Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids behave, so she averts any disasters.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Grave Mistake/ Leader of the Rack

programme.desc: Ross is thrilled to have his son for the holidays and wants to introduce him to Chanukah.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Stampede!

programme.title: 44 Cats: Meatball's Secret Move

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac

programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Rise and Shine/ Waiting/ Fungus Among Us
programme.desc: A look inside Patrick Star's rock; SpongeBob must wait for a toy to arrive in the mail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gary's Got Legs/ King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary gets a set of legs to keep up with SpongeBob, but makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. And, Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king od SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob in RandomLand/ SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he can't figure out why.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown Bubbletown. Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Food Con Castaways/ Snail Mail
programme.desc: The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods. Later SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squiditis/ Demolition Doofus
programme.desc: Gary will do anything to get the new treats SpongeBob brings home. Mr. Puff enters SpongeBob in the demolition derby.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank and it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to save him. After failing to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob in RandomLand/ SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he can't figure out why.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mutiny on the Krusty/ The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, its crew and customers need Krabs to lead them home. Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he's afraid to let it go.

programme.title: The Loud House: Absent Minded/ Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn the junior administrator job, but doesn't want to give up the perks that come along with it. When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Back Out There/ Spell It Out
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, tries to cure his post-breakup blues.Tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book once to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Technicolor Weather
programme.desc: From Sapphire caves to bizarre blue lava and rainbow clouds, this episode exposes the invisible forces behind the strangest, most beautiful events the planet. Featuring forces that eat snow, create perfect clear cubes and cause walrus gatherings.

programme.title: Top Ten: Worst Hurricanes of the 2000s
programme.desc: Fuelled by warm ocean water, they are the most violent and destructive storms on earth. We count down the worst Hurricanes to hit the planet since the start of the new millennium.

programme.title: Top Ten: Weather 'What Ifs'
programme.desc: History is dotted with close calls and near misses that meant the difference between life and death. We countdown the top ten weather 'what ifs.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Snowmobile Desperation
programme.desc: Scott and Vivian Mayo travel to their remote camp outside Cantwell, Alaska. Two days into their trip, Scott heads out alone on his snowmobile to carve trails when he becomes disoriented in heavy fog.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Wild Weather Control
programme.desc: Winter that's one for the record books, a bus that tries to outrun rare Romanian tornado and a shelf cloud that is the stuff of nightmares when wild weather is unleashed.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Texas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood in the Texas Hill Country kills 13 people and destroys 350 homes. A father watches helplessly as his house is pulled down the river, and his wife and two children are tossed into the current.

programme.title: Top Ten Extreme Jobs
programme.desc: Extreme jobs are not for everyone, but if you're willing to battle raging weather and risk life and limb for your paycheck, you may be a perfect candidate. We are counting down the top ten most extreme jobs on the planet.

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Destinations
programme.desc: From extreme heat, to bone chilling cold, every year millions of us set out on a weather watching adventure. If you love weather like we do, these are the top ten must-see destinations for your travel bucket list.

programme.title: Top Ten Amazing Moments
programme.desc: For more than thirty years, our meteorologists have battled the wildest weather on the planet. They've taken you along for the ride and in the heart of the storm, their reports have kept you informed. We look at ten amazing moments in weather reporting.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Floods and Spiders
programme.desc: Test your knowledge of poisonous spiders, big wave wipeouts, icy hills and tumbleweeds on the attack! Find out if you'd know what to do if you were trapped in a flash flood or small plane crash.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Jellyfish
programme.desc: Looking at the possibilities of surviving a massive avalanche, as well as a terrible sting from a jellyfish. Also featuring footage on deathly heat in the desert, white-water rapids and much more.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving Tornadoes
programme.desc: Video of tornadoes tearing through an airport, a gas station and a trailer park is shown. What do you do when a tornado towers beside your car and how to survive a brutal twister that rips through a city is featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Gators and Ice Tsunami
programme.desc: What would you do if a wall of ice threatened to crush your home? Could you cope being trapped in an elevator? Incredible video pits you against deadly black ice, intense sandstorms, and hungry alligators!

programme.desc: The science and stories of weather, plus in-depth forecasts with a focus on weekend weather.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: The latest news and weather to prepare for the weekend.

programme.desc: Duck and take cover, Mother Nature's mad and she's unleashing the very worst of weather.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: It's an eye opening experience when the dead center of extreme weather rolls in and there’s no time to get out of its way.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Surviving the Weather
programme.desc: From monster tornadoes to epic floods, when extreme weather strikes, there's no way to hit back, all we can do is fight to survive nature's onslaught.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Man-Made Earthquakes

programme.title: Hoarders: Constance and Jeri Jo
programme.desc: Constance is a food hoarder and her daughter will contact the authorities if she doesn't get help. Jeri Jo is married to a convicted murderer who's in jail for life, and she claims her loneliness causes her to hoard.

programme.title: Hoarders: Debra and Patty
programme.desc: Debra has filled her house with a ton of clothes and run up a $50,000 credit card debt. Patty has stuffed her house with so many floor-to-ceiling cardboard boxes that she's had to move to her son's place.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joni and Millie
programme.desc: Child Protective Services had to take Joni's granddaughter away from her because of her hoarding. Also, Millie has already tried to clean up her act, only to relapse and start hoarding again. Daughter Chelsea has one last ultimatum for her.

programme.title: Hoarders: Manuel and Carla

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe

programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Small

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Legend of Torbaclaun

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Meet Tanya Keys

programme.title: Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart: Weapon of Choice

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Oh Yeah!

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Something Salted and Twisted
programme.desc: Alan has a family dinner to celebrate the publication of a newspaper article that calls him a 'good doctor, neighbour and guy,' but he's crushed when his mother is not impressed. After drowning his sorrow in many drinks, he has a life-changing epiphany.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Golly Moses, She's a Muffin
programme.desc: Charlie's not happy when he learns that Kandi has been living in sin with Alan in his house, particularly because of his own recent dry spell with women. Things begin to look up for Charlie when a special visitor comes knocking on his door.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Always a Bridesmaid, Never a Burro
programme.desc: Alan is depressed that his hot, young girlfriend, Kandi, has left him to go stay with his bitter ex-wife, Judith, who has brainwashed her against him. Meanwhile, Kandi sets Judith up on a date with her father, Andy.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: And the Plot Moistens
programme.desc: Jake's teacher, Francine, calls Alan and Judith in to discuss Jake's lack of interest in school. Desperate to communicate with someone intelligent while continuing to see his airhead girlfriend, Kandi, Alan starts a platonic relationship with Francine.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Pot-Smoking Monkey
programme.desc: Alan is determined to gain custody of his and Kandi's dog after she walks away from their split with both the condo and the car. Having also lost everything to Judith following their divorce, Alan decides to hire her lawyer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tucked, Taped and Gorgeous
programme.desc: Alan befriends Greg, a gay single dad, causing Alan and Charlie to re-examine their own sexual identities. Meanwhile, Jake has a crush on Greg's daughter, Sophie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Large Birds, Spiders and Mom
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan ignorantly try to prepare Jake for his first day of junior high, but may wind up traumatizing him instead.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Kinda Like Necrophilia
programme.desc: Alan seeks revenge when he discovers that Charlie stole his high school girlfriend.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Meander to Your Dander
programme.desc: Charlie coaches Alan in the fine art of breaking up with a woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Pie Hole, Herb
programme.desc: Alan lends Charlie money and crosses the line in his attempts to get it back.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Mooch at the Boo
programme.desc: Jake disappears with the daughter of Charlie's neighbour, a former NFL player, and Charlie is left to cover his back. Meanwhile, Alan scores a hot date with the help of Charlie's Mercedes.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: He Smelled the Ham, He Got Excited
programme.desc: Evelyn offers to pay for Jake's college education, leaving Alan to wonder if he ever needs to work again.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Laxative Tester, Horse Inseminator
programme.desc: Alan takes a job working for Evelyn and Charlie is forced to mend Chelsea and Jake's rocky relationship.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Captain Terry's Spray-on Hair
programme.desc: Charlie is crushed when he learns that he hasn't been satisfying Chelsea. Alan attempts to cure his thinning hair on the cheap.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Girls and a Guy Named Bud
programme.desc: When Jake learns that Alan is dating Eldridge's mom, he packs his things to stay with Judith and Herb.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hookers, Hookers, Hookers
programme.desc: Lyndsey and Eldridge move into Charlie's house after Alan burns down their home.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Thank You for the Intercourse
programme.desc: When Walden begins redecorating the beach house, Alan becomes overly emotional.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Pleasing Women Since 2003
programme.desc: Alan befriends Lyndsey’s boyfriend in an effort to find out what he has that Alan doesn’t. Meanwhile, Walden helps Jenny be more proactive in pursuing her acting career.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: How to Get Rid of Alan Harper

programme.title: The King of Queens: Arthur, Spooner

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Big Bang

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Beauty Is Only Spanx Deep
programme.desc: Christine considers plastic surgery after a pretty young waitress flirts with Mr. Harris.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Zborn Again
programme.desc: Sophia tries once again to dissuade Dorothy from reconciling with her ex-husband Stan.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: How Do You Solve a Problem Like Sophia
programme.desc: Sophia decides to join a convent after her favourite nun, Sister Agnes, dies.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mrs. George Devereaux
programme.desc: Blanche has a dream in which she is visited by her deceased husband, George Devereaux.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun..Before They Die
programme.desc: Blanche tries to help Sophia seduce her date; Rose's relationship with Miles is affected.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stand by Your Man
programme.desc: Blanche meets a man at the library and only after they make a date does she realize he's in a wheelchair. Meanwhile, Rose wants to keep one of the puppies from Dreyfuss's litter despite Blanche's feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide's Revenge
programme.desc: Dorothy must give the eulogy at her brother (a cross dresser), Phil's funeral. Meanwhile, a feud between Sophia and Phil's widow reaches a peak leading Sophia to reveal her hidden feelings about her son's alternative lifestyle.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Bloom Is Off the Rose
programme.desc: Rose wants more adventure in her relationship with Miles, so she signs them up for sky diving lessons. Meanwhile, Blanche's relationship with an abusive man causes Dorothy to speak her feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sister of the Bride
programme.desc: Blanche's gay brother Clayton, makes a visit to Miami with a surprise, he has found the right person to make a commitment to, but Blanche still can't get over Clayton's sexual orientation.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Miles to Go

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Dorothy has been sneaking around so that Sophia doesn't discover that she's been dating Stan. However, when Stan proposes, Dorothy must reveal the truth to Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Totally against Dorothy and Stan's impending nuptials, Sophia vows to not let the ceremony go off. Meanwhile, Blanche begins interviewing for a new roommate since Dorothy is planning to move out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Older and Wiser
programme.desc: Wanting someone to watch after Sophia during the day, Dorothy gets Sophia a job under false pretenses. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose are all excited about being hired as models for a Penny Saver.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Melodrama
programme.desc: Blanche wants to intensify her relationship with her infamous one-night-stand-man, Mel Bushman. Meanwhile, Rose tries her hand at TV reporting. Her assignment: a dog show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Even Grandmas Get the Blues

programme.desc: Rose has a new man, Carl, in her life but suddenly out of the blue Miles returns, still undercover in the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: What a Difference a Date Makes

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love for Sale
programme.desc: The girls prepare for the Children's Hospital Bachelorette Auction and a reluctant Dorothy decides to participate. She is in for a quick surprise when Stan walks in and begins bidding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Henny Penny: Straight, No Chaser
programme.desc: The girls are quarantined with first-graders when they all catch the measles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego - California Tales: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk
programme.desc: Mkhaya, the youngest baby elephant in the Safari Park herd, learns to use her trunk. Will Alba the Andean bear become a first-time mom? Zoo vets examine Mandazzi the gorilla, and Jeff the snake chaser looks for he elusive costal patch nose snake.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Lumpy Duck
programme.desc: Dr. Ross closely examines a duck with a lump in his throat. Dr. Lavigne uses x-ray film during surgery in a very unexpected way, while Dr. Blue tries to uncover a guinea pig mystery at the clinic. Dr. Lavigne's wife joins a local roller derby team.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sneak Peeks
programme.desc: It's a jam-packed season filled with higher stakes, and for Tia, another opportunity to fight for these special animals who deserve a chance at life.

programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne performs a risky surgery on a loving pit bull with a record-breaking tumour. Dr. Ross examines a rescue pigeon turned pet and an aspiring vet student joins Dr. Blue at Cy-Fair. The doctors deal with a heartbreaking situation at the clinic.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Coastal Criminals
programme.desc: Officer James Benvenuti chases down two lobster poachers in Rye. In a puzzling case, Officer Graham Courtney investigates a man on the beach found covered in blood. And Sergeant Adam Cheney attempts to apprehend trespassers on the railroad tracks.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Lt. Bill Boudreau investigates a complaint about a man illegally feeding bears. Officer Jon Demler pulls over a swerving car, only to find himself in the middle of a domestic dispute. The dive team searches for a man who may have drowned in Kingston.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: Officer Fluette and Moxie attend their graduation. Officer Holmes and trainee McDermott investigate a possible illegal bait site and run a decoy operation with Officer Egan. Sergeant Lucas checks on a moose with odd behavior.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.desc: William Lewis breaks out of prison, continues his killing spree and takes a 12-year-old girl hostage in an effort to lure Sergeant Benson to him. With time running out, Benson must decide how much she is willing to sacrifice in order to save the child.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Post-Mortem Blues
programme.desc: In the moments after William Lewis' death, Sergeant Benson is rescued by the SVU squad, but her torment continues. The Internal Affairs investigation of her actions is deemed inconclusive, and with no evidence to corroborate her story, she risks arrest.

programme.title: Modern Family: Lifetime Supply
programme.desc: When Phil misses the call from his doctor's office with his test results, he automatically jumps to conclusions and starts saying his goodbyes. Javier pops up unannounced again and takes Manny to the horse races for a belated birthday celebration.

programme.title: Modern Family: Egg Drop
programme.desc: Luke and Manny are given a school project to design a capsule that will protect an egg from a two-story drop, but when Claire and Jay catch wind of it, their own competitive drives kick in.

programme.title: Modern Family: Little Bo Bleep

programme.title: Modern Family: Me? Jealous?
programme.desc: Phil is so preoccupied with impressing his new business partner that he doesn't realize the man is being overtly inappropriate with Claire.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sisterhood
programme.desc: Intelligence tracks a vigilante killing rapists. The investigation hits home for Burgess who begins to question if the men who attacked her sister truly paid for their actions.

programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?

programme.title: South Park: Probably

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die

programme.title: South Park: Cartmanland

programme.title: South Park: Towelie

programme.title: South Park: How to Eat With Your Butt

programme.title: South Park: The Entity

programme.title: South Park: All About the Mormons?
programme.desc: A Mormon kid moves to South Park and it's up to Stan to beat him up. But when Stan and his dad meet their new Mormon neighbours, they become fascinated with how genuinely nice they are.

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: After Wendy breaks up with Stan the boys take him to 'Raisins,' a local restaurant known for its great chicken wings and hot girls.

programme.title: South Park: Good Times With Weapons
programme.desc: The boys are transformed into Japanese Warriors after they trick a vendor and buy martial arts weapons at a local flea market.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.title: South Park: You Got F'd in the A
programme.desc: Stan just got served, and now it's up to him to put together a team of South Park's best dancers to compete against a troupe from Orange County.

programme.title: South Park: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The children of South Park are drawn to 'Mr. Jefferson,' the new neighbour in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get 'Mr. Jefferson' to love him best.

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings
programme.desc: The boys of South Park produce their own morning news show on the school's closed-circuit television station and are immediately caught up in an intense competition for ratings.

programme.title: South Park: Stupid Spoiled Whore Video Play Set
programme.desc: Disturbed by the corruptive influence Paris Hilton has on all little girls in South Park, one of the town's favourite citizens, Mr. Slave, challenges her to a 'whore-off.'

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Incredible Gift
programme.desc: After sustaining a severe head injury, Cartman appears to have the power to see into the future. South Park detectives are quick to enlist his help in cracking unsolved murder cases.

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: The boys set up the 'Awesome Talent Agency' and pool all their resources to impress their first client only to have an agency run by the Chinese Mafia steal her away.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys

programme.title: Movie: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: In order to get next to a computer expert whose new discovery may place national security at risk, Malcolm Turner must once again impersonate his grandmother. He poses as the hacker's nanny, but things get complicated when he gets close to the family.

programme.title: Movie: Barbershop: The Next Cut
programme.desc: Things are going well for Calvin, Eddie and the rest of the crew at Calvin's Barbershop, but their neighbourhood is taking a turn for the worse. With gang members roaming the streets, the crew needs to work together to save the shop and the community.

programme.title: Movie: Think Like a Man
programme.desc: When a group of men discover that their women have been getting relationship advice from Steve Harvey, they plot to turn the tables on them.

programme.title: Movie: Barbershop: The Next Cut

programme.desc: Gina and Pam witness a bank robbery and go into hiding.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Golly Moses, She's a Muffin
programme.desc: Charlie's not happy when he learns that Kandi has been living in sin with Alan in his house, particularly because of his own recent dry spell with women. Things begin to look up for Charlie when a special visitor comes knocking on his door.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Always a Bridesmaid, Never a Burro
programme.desc: Alan is depressed that his hot, young girlfriend, Kandi, has left him to go stay with his bitter ex-wife, Judith, who has brainwashed her against him. Meanwhile, Kandi sets Judith up on a date with her father, Andy.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: And the Plot Moistens
programme.desc: Jake's teacher, Francine, calls Alan and Judith in to discuss Jake's lack of interest in school. Desperate to communicate with someone intelligent while continuing to see his airhead girlfriend, Kandi, Alan starts a platonic relationship with Francine.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Pot-Smoking Monkey
programme.desc: Alan is determined to gain custody of his and Kandi's dog after she walks away from their split with both the condo and the car. Having also lost everything to Judith following their divorce, Alan decides to hire her lawyer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tucked, Taped and Gorgeous

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Large Birds, Spiders and Mom
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan ignorantly try to prepare Jake for his first day of junior high, but may wind up traumatizing him instead.

programme.desc: Alan seeks revenge when he discovers that Charlie stole his high school girlfriend.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Meander to Your Dander
programme.desc: Charlie coaches Alan in the fine art of breaking up with a woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Pie Hole, Herb
programme.desc: Alan lends Charlie money and crosses the line in his attempts to get it back.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Mooch at the Boo
programme.desc: Jake disappears with the daughter of Charlie's neighbour, a former NFL player, and Charlie is left to cover his back. Meanwhile, Alan scores a hot date with the help of Charlie's Mercedes.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: He Smelled the Ham, He Got Excited
programme.desc: Evelyn offers to pay for Jake's college education, leaving Alan to wonder if he ever needs to work again.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Captain Terry's Spray-on Hair
programme.desc: Charlie is crushed when he learns that he hasn't been satisfying Chelsea. Alan attempts to cure his thinning hair on the cheap.

programme.desc: When Walden begins redecorating the beach house, Alan becomes overly emotional.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Window Pain

programme.desc: Christine realizes that one reckless evening may have jeopardized her chance to begin dating Mr. Harris.

programme.desc: After waiting to consummate her relationship with Mr. Harris, Christine is finally ready, until Barb gives her reason to worry. Matthew rethinks medical school after discovering that his assigned cadaver is a former neighbour.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Beauty Is Only Spanx Deep
programme.desc: Christine considers plastic surgery after a pretty young waitress flirts with Mr. Harris.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Zborn Again
programme.desc: Sophia tries once again to dissuade Dorothy from reconciling with her ex-husband Stan.

programme.desc: Blanche has a dream in which she is visited by her deceased husband, George Devereaux.

programme.desc: Blanche tries to help Sophia seduce her date; Rose's relationship with Miles is affected.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide's Revenge

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Bloom Is Off the Rose
programme.desc: Rose wants more adventure in her relationship with Miles, so she signs them up for sky diving lessons. Meanwhile, Blanche's relationship with an abusive man causes Dorothy to speak her feelings.

programme.desc: Two contestants on the television show 'The One' find out if they're destined to be together, but then a handsome rancher acting as a guide swoops in.

programme.title: When Hope Calls: New Hope
programme.desc: Sisters Lillian and Grace face disapproval when they establish an orphanage in Lillian's hometown. When a fire breaks out, they are swept up in the community's effort to prevent the blaze from engulfing the town.

programme.title: When Hope Calls: From the Ashes
programme.desc: Lillian rises to the defense of two of her boys when they become Constable Gabriel Kinslow's prime suspects in the investigation of the town fire. Rosemary and Lee Coulter come to Brookfield to help with reconstruction efforts.

programme.title: Movie: Love Under the Rainbow
programme.desc: A woman has dreamt her whole life about finding her true love and starting a family. Now, she's a teacher who is still on her quest for love. When a new architect moves to town, romance is in the air for both of them.

programme.title: Movie: Dater's Handbook
programme.desc: A woman changes her personality according to a dating guide book to find a husband, but realizes the man she wants is the one who loves her for who she is.

programme.title: Movie: Surprised by Love
programme.desc: A young businesswoman tries to convince parents to approve of her boyfriend. She finds herself questioning her own life choices.

programme.title: Movie: Summer of Dreams
programme.desc: A fading pop star is on the verge of losing everything when she runs away to Ohio to teach a group of talented misfit kids. She soon realizes that fame isn't everything.

programme.title: Movie: Walking the Dog
programme.desc: Rival lawyers battle each other in court as their respective dogs fall madly in love, bringing their guardians together at every turn until they reluctantly realize it may not just be the pups who are each other's true Valentine.

programme.title: Movie: Love at Sea
programme.desc: Event planner Olivia gets a great opportunity to organize an event on a luxury cruise. She meets her match in the charming Tony, who is on a trial run as Cruise Director, but they must work together to make the cruise event a hit.

programme.title: Movie: June in January
programme.desc: Every January, June goes through post-holiday blues and Alex surprises her.

programme.title: Movie: Rescuing Madison
programme.desc: A romance begins when a famous singer is rescued by a firefighter.

programme.title: Movie: Forever in My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs - back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Movie: A Harvest Wedding
programme.desc: A wedding planner in New York is hired to plan the most anticipated wedding of the season. But the bride wants the wedding to be on the family farm which is now being run by her older brother who happens to be her ex.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Head-on Collision
programme.desc: Ice blankets the roads of Alaska, causing major issues for the residents and the Alaska State Troopers trying to keep them safe.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Campground Crazies
programme.desc: In Juneau, troopers Jake Abbott and Aaron Frenzel head out on boat patrol to Prince Cove, a popular spot for king salmon. In Mat-Su Valley, Joseph Hess investigates an alarming discovery: campers have found remains that appear to be human toes and hands.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Highway Hijinks
programme.desc: Follow Troopers as they battle crime and enforce wildlife laws from the breathtaking Seward Highway to the Alaskan back country.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Battling Demons
programme.desc: Summers in Alaska bring out some of the state's wildest creatures, and some are surprisingly human.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Shot on Thin Ice
programme.desc: Get a fresh take on a classic episode with new insights from some fan-favorite Troopers.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: School of Hard Knocks

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks or Bust: Rough Seas

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: Sex for Sale
programme.desc: Through brutal stories and incredible access, this episode documents the pimps, madams and prostitutes at the heart of an industry where people become commodities.

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: Car Jackers
programme.desc: Increased automobile security means that car criminals are becoming more ingenious than ever. Gangs are working together to steal cars - for them car theft can be more profitable than selling drugs.

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: The Money Laundry
programme.desc: Follow the dirty drug dollars from American trap houses to wholesalers and transporters, funnelling billions into Mexico's money laundry.

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: Human Cargo
programme.desc: Thousands of Central Americans head north to the US border in hopes for a brighter future, but people smugglers, who are often linked to cartels, make it difficult to cross without their supervision and a price.

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: Knock-offs
programme.desc: Anything and everything can be faked: watches, purses, shoes, electronics, smartphones. Go underground to see the breathtaking enterprise and expertise of counterfeiting - an economy that turns over an estimated $500 billion a year.

programme.title: Underworld, Inc.: Illegal Gambling
programme.desc: Millions of Americans love to gamble, but some forms of gambling are restricted or illegal, pushing them underground, where the rules are very different. Here, if you want to play you have to pay.

programme.title: Paradise Islands: Born of Fire
programme.desc: The islands of Indonesia, Malaysia and New Guinea are the biologically richest on earth. There are tigers and elephants, rhinos and birds of paradise. But why this profusion of life? Follow the story of the islands, from their violent and fiery birth.

programme.title: Paradise Islands: Sun Kings
programme.desc: The Paradise Islands stretch along the equator, with tropical sun driving life on these islands. They are home to the oldest, richest rainforests on Earth. The sunlit canopy is home to gibbons and hornbills, while tigers and rhinos roam the forest floor.

programme.title: Paradise Islands: Creatures of the Moon
programme.desc: The reefs and coastal forests, beaches and shallow waters of the Paradise Islands are amongst the richest on Earth. This is a world under the sway of the moon. Creatures such as proboscis monkeys, fiddler crabs and whale sharks move to the moon's rhythm.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild India: Kings of the Jungle
Untamed Philippines: Enchanted Islands
programme.desc: A nation of more than 100 million people on a collection of over 7,600 islands all set in the warm emerald seas of the Pacific Ocean, the Philippines is a land of sparkling wonder.

programme.title: South Africa
programme.desc: From iconic giants to the totally bizarre, only South Africa's fittest will survive.

programme.title: Namibia's Skeleton Coast
programme.desc: The story of how some of the world's largest creatures survive in the inhospitable deserts of Namibia.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Gloves Off!: Fox Trot
programme.desc: Features enhancements of past episodes of Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Monkey Do, Monkey Don’t
programme.desc: Dr. K takes care of a Tamarin monkey that gets injured playing with the family dog.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Pot-Bellied Pig Out
programme.desc: Dr. K jumps into action when a guinea pig arrives having a seizure. Dr. Diaz treats an electrical burn in a ferret's mouth and Dr. Thielen helps a mother say goodbye.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego - California Tales: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk
programme.desc: Mkhaya, the youngest baby elephant in the Safari Park herd, learns to use her trunk. Will Alba the Andean bear become a first-time mom? Zoo vets examine Mandazzi the gorilla, and Jeff the snake chaser looks for he elusive costal patch nose snake.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Lumpy Duck
programme.desc: Dr. Ross closely examines a duck with a lump in his throat. Dr. Lavigne uses x-ray film during surgery in a very unexpected way, while Dr. Blue tries to uncover a guinea pig mystery at the clinic. Dr. Lavigne's wife joins a local roller derby team.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sneak Peeks
programme.desc: It's a jam-packed season filled with higher stakes, and for Tia, another opportunity to fight for these special animals who deserve a chance at life.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Bonus Tails: 16-Pound Tumor
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne performs a risky surgery on a loving pit bull with a record-breaking tumour. Dr. Ross examines a rescue pigeon turned pet and an aspiring vet student joins Dr. Blue at Cy-Fair. The doctors deal with a heartbreaking situation at the clinic.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk

programme.title: North Woods Law: Coastal Criminals
programme.desc: Officer James Benvenuti chases down two lobster poachers in Rye. In a puzzling case, Officer Graham Courtney investigates a man on the beach found covered in blood. And Sergeant Adam Cheney attempts to apprehend trespassers on the railroad tracks.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Lt. Bill Boudreau investigates a complaint about a man illegally feeding bears. Officer Jon Demler pulls over a swerving car, only to find himself in the middle of a domestic dispute. The dive team searches for a man who may have drowned in Kingston.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: Officer Fluette and Moxie attend their graduation. Officer Holmes and trainee McDermott investigate a possible illegal bait site and run a decoy operation with Officer Egan. Sergeant Lucas checks on a moose with odd behavior.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: America Unearthed: Bigfoot of the Bayou
programme.desc: Scott Wolter heads down to the land of gumbo and grits to search for the Honey Island Swamp Monster. He spends a solitary night in the Louisiana bayou to collect evidence of the elusive creature's existence.

programme.title: America Unearthed: Phoenicians in America
programme.desc: Scott Wolter inspects mysterious carvings on a stone that may prove the ancient Phoenicians made it to America over 1,000 years before Christopher Columbus.

programme.title: America Unearthed: Drake's Lost Treasure
programme.desc: Scott Wolter travels up and down the Pacific coast in search of the long-lost treasure of ruthless privateer Sir Francis Drake.

programme.title: America Unearthed: Alien Artifacts
programme.desc: Scott Wolter bushwhacks his way through the jungles of Veracruz, Mexico, as he investigates ancient artifacts that could shatter the archaeological record forever and change everything we know about our place in the universe.

programme.title: America Unearthed: Conspiracy in the New World
programme.desc: New discoveries of long-lost relics could rewrite everything we know about the Americas, and using cutting-edge tech, archaeologist Scott Wolter investigates if some of the most feared warriors in history were secret trailblazers to the New World.

programme.title: America Unearthed: The Ripper Unmasked
programme.desc: Scott Wolter investigates a sensational new theory about the identity of Jack the Ripper. He also uncovers a connection between the ritualistic patterns of the Ripper murders and the Freemasons.

programme.desc: Flora Jessop was born at the bottom of an oppressive hierarchy established by the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, or the FLDS. Growing up in Colorado City, Arizona, she suffered greatly at the hands of her father.

programme.title: Escaping Evil: My Life in a Cult
programme.desc: A man blindly follows god-like cult leader Yahweh Ben Yahweh even when Yahweh unleashes a bloody campaign of murders and beheadings. He maintains his devotion until Yahweh's tyranny and violence is turned against his devoted follower.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Houdini
programme.desc: Newark police catch a suspect red-handed, but back at the precinct, the suspect escapes from the interrogation room. After 'Houdini' eludes several attempts to capture him over the next two months, the Fugitive Task Force takes over.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Just One Step Behind
programme.desc: Detectives scour the streets to find people who are willing to provide information on a fugitive's whereabouts.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chasing a Ghost
programme.desc: Investigators search for a murder suspect in the towns and mountainsides of Puerto Rico, which proves to be a nightmare.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chinatown Takedown
programme.desc: An immigrant accused of viciously murdering his own family may be hiding out in Manhattan's Chinatown neighbourhood.

programme.title: See No Evil: Rhonda's Gone
programme.desc: On December 2nd 2014, Rhonda Daugherty vanishes. Detectives turn to the public for information on her mysterious disappearance. A tip leads investigators to surveillance footage from a hotel where they uncover a journey of duplicity and deception.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: Tom and Jill Estes' bodies are found behind a dumpster in Festus, Missouri. Police are baffled, until a receipt leads to CCTV of a blood-stained suspect. A trail of bodies reveals a killer who must be stopped - before he strikes again.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Clown Did It
programme.desc: Nearly three decades after a woman was shot in her Palm Beach County, Fla., home by someone wearing a clown costume, two people who were there describe what they saw in this interview.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Last Move
programme.desc: When 72 year-old Bruce Firman is found brutally murdered in his home, Detective Keri Harrison must discover who would want this kind, elderly man dead.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Decoding a Murder
programme.desc: It was a case that haunted Lancaster, Pennsylvania: the 1992 murder of teacher Christy Mirack. More than two decades later, a new breed of detective would help break the case, using DNA in a whole new way. And unmasking a killer living in their midst.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Turn
programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime: A Killer With a Camera
programme.desc: Adrian Loya breaks into the apartment of Lisa and Anna Trubnikova and opens fire, after months of planning. Police find he is wearing a video camera and journal to record his actions. At trial the jury must decide if his insanity plea can be believed.
