programme.title: Deadly Women: The Dark Side
programme.desc: These women aren't afraid to take a walk on the dark side.

programme.title: Dead North: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: When Christopher Regan goes missing in the Upper Peninsula of Michigan, police chief Laura Frizzo is in a race against time to find him.

programme.title: Dead North: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: In the case of missing man Christopher Regan, Chief Laura Frizzo is hot in pursuit of two suspects. Chris' lover Kelly Cochran and her husband Jason.

programme.title: Dead North: Spring Thaw
programme.desc: After their house is searched, Kelly and Jason Cochran, the top suspects in Chris Regan's disappearance, skip town. A few months later, one of them is murdered.

programme.title: Dead North: Spring Thaw
programme.desc: Jason Cochran one of the top suspects in the Chris Regan disappearance is dead. Police Chief Laura Frizzo is on a mission to arrest his wife Kelly Cochran for the murder of Chris Regan.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Hellfire in the Hollow
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old mother doesn't return from night classes and her car is found burned, investigators immediately suspect foul play. However no one is prepare for the web of lies that ultimately unfold due to her disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mom Makes Four
programme.desc: When Carla Fuqua vanishes after a night out with friends, her family panics. She's a dedicated mother who would never leave her son behind. Even worse, Carla has become the fourth missing person in a town of less than 5,000.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Something's Not Right
programme.desc: When a popular cheerleader goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town is sent into a panic. After her sports car is found abandoned, investigators are sure something is not right, but no one expects the horror that ensues.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: I Will Find You
programme.desc: 19-year-old Ali Kemp was at a pool in Leawood, Kansas in June 2002 when her father found her body in the pool's pump room. News reports and interviews with investigators and family tell the story of a father's quest to find his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: All News Is Local
programme.desc: In August 2000, 19-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. Local reporters and family members tell the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer. Then... a young man's murder looks like a robbery gone wrong until Kenda learns the odd reason he's living there.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions - and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: John Gotti
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname `Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Lucky Luciano
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the US government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Capturing Oswald
programme.desc: Explore the assassination of President John F. Kennedy through the men who caught Lee Harvey Oswald, the officers of the Dallas Police Department.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Adventures: Turkeys South of the Border
programme.desc: Jimmy is Mexico hunting with Larry Renken for a Goul Turkey.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Civil War
programme.desc: A look at the myths surrounding America's Civil War, including how the Union didn't go to war to end slavery, most deaths weren't caused by battle wounds and how Grant and Lee didn't end the conflict.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's, the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy emerges, and it's in the United State's own backyard.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: Tank Battles of The Great War
programme.desc: During WWI, for the first time in history, a British Mark IV tank, meets a German AFV on the battlefield.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: The Battle of France
programme.desc: At the outset of WWII, the Germans pioneer a new form of mobile armoured warfare. This is the story of the famed Nazi Blitzkrieg, as thousands of panzers burst through terrain thought impassible to conquer Western Europe in a matter of weeks.

programme.desc: After serving in the U.S. Air Force for six years, a couple decides to leave Arizona and find their dream home in the military-friendly town of Virginia Beach, Virginia. A life-changing $100,000 settlement is used for a down payment.

programme.desc: A professional poker player and his family are looking for their ultimate dream home in Fort Worth, Texas. David Bromstad's expertise is needed in order to find a place big enough to fit dad, mom and their three small children.

programme.desc: A job transfer to Cincinnati, Ohio, has a young couple seeking a new home. While she dreams of a Tudor-style home with steeple roofs and tons of character, he's hoping for a Craftsman that doesn't need any renovation.

programme.desc: A couple has $1 million to spend on a place in Destin, Florida. She's pushing for a condo right on the beach, but he'd prefer a single family home on the bayside.

programme.desc: A young couple hunts for a home for their busy family of seven in Utah County, UT. He wants a modern-style home with a pool and a large theater room. She'd like to have a more traditional style home.

programme.desc: Foster parent Jen Baumgarten can't imagine leaving her neighborhood and giving up her neighbours' support, but she has to have more space for her family or risk losing them.

programme.desc: A tour through three houses in nearby Woodway, Texas.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Chip and Jo Give a Run-Down Tiny House a Total Makeover for a Couple
programme.desc: Cameron and Jessie Bell currently live in a 690-square-foot house and love the cozy charm of small-scale living. While they're not necessarily looking for a larger space, they do want a place to call their own, and they need Chip and Joanna's help.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A European Cottage-Style Dream Home With a View
programme.desc: Chip and Jo's latest clients are looking for a house with a view and plenty of room for their grandkids to play. After a frustrating house hunt, Chip and Jo come up with a creative plan that will give them the home of their dreams.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Storybook Style House
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage travels south to Winston Salem, North Carolina to save what they can from this storybook style home in two days. They get some unique chandeliers, sinks, and windows from this Robert Byrd house.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Virginia Victorian Home
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage mantles, cabinets, sinks and a round window from a late Victorian-style home.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wayne Lanes Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro, VA, to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. Robert is determined to redeem himself from last season's bowling fiasco.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: C&O Railway
programme.desc: The team travels to Clifton Forge, Virginia, to conquer C&O Railway's vast repair space. They work to salvage the steam engine repair plant by saving railway bases and corrugated glass. Later, they take apart a baby grand piano.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cosby Brothers Mill
programme.desc: Mike and Robert give Tay a history lesson with an old dentistry x-ray machine before the team loads up for a project in Grottoes, VA. They start at Cosby Brothers Mill where they hope to salvage some old mill parts.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former Dixie Furniture Plant
programme.desc: The team travel to a vacant furniture plant in Lexington, NC, where they work in near-darkness salvaging conveyor belts, fire doors, veneer molds, factory carts, and industrial lights.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Gold Mine
programme.desc: The builders salvage a variety of barnwood off an Ohio barn, but to save it all, they have to deal with a dangerous roof. Mark finds a flooring company with a new idea for old wood and later visits an incredible timber frame home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hidden History
programme.desc: The crew saves an Ohio barn built with incredible craftsmanship and Mark scouts another barn that turns out to be a keeper. Later, he visits a massive timber-frame barn that was perfectly restored on its original site and converted into a restaurant.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Restoration Week
programme.desc: The crew restores two cabins and builds a barn door for their blacksmith shop. Mark Bowe scouts an old log cabin and drives through a river to visit the fishing cabin he and his crew built two years ago.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Lone Star Boneyard
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the crew start a new boneyard in Texas by building a timber frame barn and two log cabins with some help from their new business partner. Mark gets his first look at the incredible party barn they built the last time they were in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Mark Bowe checks out some renovated grain silos and the craziest treehouse in town while the guys put a roof on their Texas timber frame. Mark's log cabin gets a Texas-style makeover, and he gets some help from his new neighbors, the Junk Gypsies.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Tennessee Treasure
programme.desc: The crew rebuilds the Minor Hill cabin in Franklin, Tennessee. Mark Bowe checks out a log cabin addition to an 1806 stone home and then tours a local whiskey distillery built inside a timber-frame barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing some off-the-hook seafood and savory sensations in Miami, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: On the Hook and in the Bun
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in off-the-hook seafood and digging into some serious sandwiches on this trip. In Seattle, a beer-lover's spot serving fantastic fish and chips and the bomb beef dip. On the big island of Hawaii, a local gem dishin' out fresh-catches.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Hidden Halloween Horrors

programme.title: Southern at Heart: Grandma's Cookbook

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: Breakfast For Dinner
programme.desc: Nancy prepares gooey cinnamon buns with cream cheese icing, sausage pancakes, and sweet potato hash with fried eggs.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Retro Reboot
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings some of his most creative chef friends to the ranch to revamp dishes that are best described as moldy oldies. Aarti Sequeira uses cardamom to give chicken a la king an Indian makeover. Justin Warner deconstructs and reinvents crab Louie.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: I'm Outta Here
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli prepares make-ahead meals for her husband, Tom, to enjoy while she's in Arizona. On the menu are farro, roasted beet and goat cheese salad, beef bourguignon, a French beef sandwich and blueberry cake with lemon mascarpone cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Alex's 16th Birthday
programme.desc: There's a big secret on the ranch -- a surprise 16th birthday party for Alex with family, friends and all her favourite food.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Truly Madly Crazy
programme.desc: Ree cooks up some crazy, fun ideas for game night food. There's a whole new take on a football favorite with pull-apart Pizza Rolls, then over-the-top Hawaiian burgers piled high with grilled pineapple.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Pizza Ree-Boot
programme.desc: Ree Drummond starts a pizza revolution with mini cauliflower pizzas for lunch with her daughter, a meal kit for herbed chicken Caesar salad pizza, Marsala mushroom and goat cheese flatbreads and a watermelon pizza.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Boxing Boys
programme.desc: Ree bakes fruity granola chocolate chip cookies and prepares a dinner of Italian sloppy Joes with delicious garlic toast.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Jewish New Year
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's family is in town to celebrate Rosh Hashana, the Jewish new year, and she makes a fabulous brunch to mark the occasion. They'll love her sweet apple butter rolls with honey marzipan frosting.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Farm Traditions
programme.desc: Molly is putting a fresh spin on the classic farm lunch. There's her easy garlic and onion challah bread, chopped salad with crumbled feta and her all-time favourite creamy homemade hummus.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Perfect Plate of Fall
programme.desc: Autumn flavours are in the spotlight as 'The Kitchen' serves a plate of fall favourites. Geoffrey shares his apple cider salmon and Katie Lee makes a brown butter safe butternut squash bake. Plus, learn easy fall appetizers with Sunny.

programme.title: Good Eats: Rich Little Poor Boy
programme.desc: One of America's most storied sandwiches gets a historic rethink and a technical do-over, from the oysters to the bread and everything in between. Alton Brown also makes an argument for shucking.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raw Ambition
programme.desc: Alton journeys through the history and science of the greatest of all raw meat dishes: steak tartare.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Spice Games
programme.desc: Four chefs who like their food with some heat fight for the title of spice master by making a spicy high-end dinner with ingredients for bread pudding, playing Spree Ball to determine their dish's pepper and creating a spicy guilty pleasure.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Blogger Battle
programme.desc: Four of America's hottest food bloggers go head to head in a culinary battle worth up to $20,000. 'Between two buns,' tacos without taco ingredients, and a 'trending dinner' are the challenges.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Food Wheel Free-For-All

programme.title: Good Eats: Bean Stalker
programme.desc: Alton reinvents the classic green bean casserole just in time to save the holidays.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Bistro

programme.title: Unique Eats: Small Bites
programme.desc: You can sample everything on the menu when it comes in the form of small bites.

programme.desc: The most unique sweets to suit your morning cup o' Joe. Abraco may be small in size, but its morning pastries are packed with big bold flavors like black sesame cardamom spiced cake, and saffron sugar babk.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Breakfast Sweets
programme.desc: These food personalities share the best Breakfast sweets from around the country. Brunches from the Pacific Northwest to New York City.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sugar High
programme.desc: It's time for the ultimate sugar high. In Miami, Brain Freeze Nitrogen Ice Cream Lab is concocting delicious creations, and offering a mad scientist challenge to eat 30 scoops of ice cream in 30 minutes.

programme.desc: Classic desserts get deliciously updated at three sweet shops across the country. Skull and Cakebones rocks vegan cupcakes in Austin, Texas, with flavors like basil berry, dirty chai and just beet it.

programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Marseille
programme.desc: From beef stew to French pizza, Andrew Zimmern uncovers Marseille's edible icons.

programme.desc: Prince Charles gives his royal approval to Phil and Christine's cakes. While Eloise challenges herself with a cake of gigantic proportions, Molly shows Manchester United pride in her latest cake creation.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cakes On The Move
programme.desc: Karisha attempts to add electronics to a challenging christening cake, and Rosie's cake lights up the night with a neon fireworks display.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Luxurious and Playful Cakes
programme.desc: Luxurious details and elegant decor make for a most-extravagant wedding cake. Then zoo animals come to life, sugar looks like hand-blown glass, and a duck rides a mechanical bull on a super playful birthday cake.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fancy Flower and Farm Cakes
programme.desc: A baker designs an epic pop culture wedding cake with a massive dragon, and customers in a coffee shop are pleasantly surprised by a sweet creation with an edible mug.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Union Hotel
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to the Bay Area to investigate aggressive paranormal activity at a historic hotel that has endured the brutal California Gold Rush, a smallpox epidemic and a period as a seedy flophouse.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Slave to Love
programme.desc: From a former spy hub on the coast of Spain to a cave in Puerto Rico that just might hold the fabled Fountain of Youth, Josh explores six legendary locations where passionate people risked it all for love.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: From a Florida prison where a convicted murderer went from hated to hero to the site of a fiery Viking massacre in Ireland, Josh explores six legendary locations where heroes and villains faced their moment of truth.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: About Time
programme.desc: From a cursed clock in Prague to a death-defying rescue in the snowy Sierra Nevada Mountains, Josh Gates explores six legendary locations that have withstood the test of time.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: What Lurks Within
programme.desc: From a lake in India with connections to alien life to a train station in Spain where a mild-mannered customs clerk took on the Nazis, Josh uncovers the mysteries of what lurks within six extraordinary locations around the globe.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: End of the World
programme.desc: From a secret underground government bunker to a town that miraculously survived a tsunami, Josh explores five locations where the end of the world was just the beginning.

programme.desc: From a treacherous island prison in Ireland to a California mining town that saw more than its share of murder and mayhem, Josh digs deep to uncover the buried secrets of six legendary locations.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Fight or Flight

programme.desc: Three sisters get more than they bargained for when they decide to take photos in a graveyard at night, and a young family's day hike turns into a nightmare when they are terrorized by an unknown creature in the woods.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Grave Diagnosis

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Sarah and Randy vow to turn Virginia's appointment around when they learn that her dream dress has been sold.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Fashion Police
programme.desc: Norah comes to her appointment with her opinionated Jordanian family.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Together as One
programme.desc: Meighan and Christina represent the newest kind of American family.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sister Resistors
programme.desc: Bride Suzy is accompanied by her bossy older sister. Lauren arrives at the fitting anxious about her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Edwina has only three months to go before her wedding; Michelle sees her dress for the first time since losing 50 pounds.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 2 Dresses, 1 Dream
programme.desc: Jacqueline wastes no time explaining that she would like two different style dresses for her wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What's My Style
programme.desc: Lela doesn't know what she wants and Christiane gets nervous about finding something.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Big Budget Brides
programme.desc: Monisha has come looking for a dress for her three wedding ceremonies. Mary has a budget of thirty thousand dollars to buy two dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Expecting Brides
programme.desc: Tisa's looking for a dress that makes her look hot even though she's three months pregnant. Victoria is six months pregnant and looking for a dress for her wedding just eight weeks away.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Rocker Brides
programme.desc: Kristin wants to find a rock 'n' roll, edgy wedding dress, while Lindsey, who's all about leather and lace, surprisingly decides on a softer wedding dress look.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More Than a Wedding
programme.desc: Cheryl has recently beaten breast cancer and had her last reconstructive surgery a week ago. Jennifer is battling a rare kidney disease, and Kristin is overcoming stage four lung cancer. For these brides, their weddings are a celebration of love and life.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Brides and Their Boys
programme.desc: Dana is shopping with her two bridesmen for an edgy wedding dress. Akisha brings her fiancé's best man to her appointment to represent her husband's opinion.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Performances Piece
programme.desc: Tony Danza makes his debut at the salon to help his Broadway co-star find the perfect bridal costume for her role in their new musical, 'Honeymoon in Vegas.' Ballerina Valerie wants a wedding gown that is nothing like her princess dance costumes.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dad's Being Dadzilla
programme.desc: Alyssa calls her father 'Dadzilla,' and his opinions rule the day. Wedding planner Michelle feels extra pressure to find the perfect dress. When Emily's custom Pnina gown is all wrong, her dad 'Papazilla' demands a solution.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You ARE a Daredevil!
programme.desc: Paralympic snowboarder Amy Purdy isn't afraid to take risks, like waiting to find her dress just three weeks before the big day. Katie is the ultimate planner and brings a list ranking her top gowns.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy, I Think I Got This
programme.desc: New consultant Shay is excited to help with a surprise marriage proposal, but trouble brews when he rejects Randy's offer to help. Former Miss USA Nia Sanchez has just one day to find her gown. Comedian Jamie learns dress shopping is no laughing matter.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Gown to Match My Black Heart
programme.desc: Feisty Camila's desire to buy a black dress may push her equally fiery mother over the edge. After years working as Pnina Tornai's right-hand woman, it's Ally's turn to be the bride.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm the Bride, Leave Some Space!
programme.desc: Nikki is looking for a fun, party-ready dress for her wild New Year's Eve wedding. Bride Natalie dreams of a finding a ball gown so massive that wedding guests will struggle to get close to her and someone could even 'hide' underneath it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That's How You Dress a Lady
programme.desc: Randy's runway show is finally here and it's his big opportunity to prove he's back as a bridal designer for good.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bedazzled Truck Driver

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Crazy Uncle Randy
programme.desc: Tracey's determined to find a black gown but mom says no and insists on calling in Tracey's fiancé to back her up in the fight for white! Randy's niece Danielle is getting married and the pressure is on her 'crazy uncle' to find her the perfect dress.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After managing to escape the lethal Hunger Games arena not once but twice, Katniss Everdeen shelters in the hidden District 13 while the people she love remain under threat from the Capitol. With the help of her friends, she prepares to save Peeta.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
programme.desc: The story comes to a close as Katniss and the unit from District 13 prepare to take down President Snow once and for all. With the nation in a full-scale war, Katniss will be tested as never before as she fights for the very future of Panem.

programme.title: Imposters: See You Soon, Macaroon
programme.desc: Niagara Falls is the backdrop as the Bumblers, Maddie, Max, Sally and Sofia try to stay one step ahead of the Doctor in an attempt to ensure their freedom and make the score of a lifetime.

programme.desc: Eva and the ladies continue their celebration with a bachelorette party that has a shady start, and an unexpected visitor. During a traditional Samurai lesson, some battles go down, and later, a long-standing rivalry finally starts to fade away.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Let's Make It Official
programme.desc: As Porsha and Dennis prepare for their baby to arrive, the ladies speculate when the parents-to-be will take their relationship to the next level. Eva deals with the stresses of wedding planning.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Bye Wig, Hello Drama
programme.desc: Kandi gets a huge surprise at her 'Welcome to the Dungeon' auditions, while Eva must deal with the ever-increasing costs for her upcoming wedding. NeNe hosts a 'Bye Wig' party where all the women must attend rocking their natural hair.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Welcome to the Dungeon
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Nene's bye wig party, the ladies try to make sense of what happened and how to move forward with Nene. Shamari must tell Ronnie about her drunken antics at the party, while Eva continues her search for the perfect wedding dress.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: The Model Bride
programme.desc: The ladies all come together to celebrate Eva and Michael's big day. Nene is overcome with emotion during the exchanging of the vows, while some of the ladies get concerned with Shamari's behavior. Nene drops a bomb about the state of her marriage.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Mo' Money, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Eva's post-honeymoon bliss crashes down around her as Marlo serves up a steaming pot of tea regarding her living situation. Since her melt down at Eva's wedding, Nene struggles over what's next for her marriage.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Caught in the Middle
programme.desc: Porsha gets ready for her gender reveal, only to have her hopes dashed before the celebration even begins. Eva pushes past the rumors surrounding her finances and re-evaluates her friendships. Cynthia's old friend makes a surprise appearance at her event.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Reunion, Part One
programme.desc: A very pregnant and glowing Porsha relives the highlights of her relationship with Dennis, but things quickly heat up when Eva is put in the hot seat. Kandi becomes emotional as she updates the ladies on her surrogacy journey. Cynthia confronts Nene.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Reunion, Part Two

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita Extended Stay: On Broadway
programme.desc: In Wichita, Kansas a young woman says she stabbed a man in self-defense and a skinhead with a violent past leaves his girlfriend battered and bruised.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita Extended Stay: Citizen's Arrest
programme.desc: A convicted thief continues his stealing ways inside the jail. A former law enforcement officer turned meth addict is now serving time with and growing closer to her dealer.

programme.title: Dateline: Stealing Paradise
programme.desc: In a tropical hideaway, adventurous Americans thought they had stumbled into paradise until their neighbours started to disappear.

programme.title: Dateline: The Smoking Gun
programme.desc: When detectives re-opened a decade old murder case, they discovered a suspect whose trail led right to their own front door.

programme.title: Dateline: Something Wicked
programme.desc: Chris Hansen reports on four extraordinary cases of women who were caught on videotape ordering murderous hits.

programme.title: Dateline: The Goldfinger Mystery
programme.desc: A married couple made an abundance of wealth in gold, but the fortune was never the key to their happiness. In fact, it may have been a motive for murder as business practices are questioned and secrets are finally confessed.

programme.title: MSNBC Live
programme.desc: News anchors present coverage of the latest breaking news as well as updates and analyses.

programme.title: MSNBC Live

programme.title: AM Joy
programme.desc: Joy Reid tackles the most important news and political topics of the week.

programme.title: Weekends With Alex Witt
programme.desc: Alex Witt presents details about the biggest stories of the day as well as the latest political developments.

programme.title: MSNBC Live With Kendis Gibson
programme.desc: Kendis Gibson hosts this presentation of the latest breaking news, and provides updates and analysis as well.

programme.title: MSNBC Live
programme.desc: News anchors present coverage of the latest breaking news as well as updates and analyses.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Unabomber
programme.desc: Writing style reveals Unabomber's identity when Ted Kaczynski's sister-in-law recognizes his phrasing in his manifesto.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: The Siege at Waco
programme.desc: The siege at the Branch Davidian compound in Waco, Texas leads to 80 deaths, and the debacle captures America's attention and changes the ATF and the FBI.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: The Explosion (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1995, Timothy McVeigh, a 26-year-old U.S. army veteran, detonated a truck bomb outside a federal building in Oklahoma City. We take a look back at the events that led up to the largest domestic terrorist attack in the history of the United States.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: McVeigh's Shocking Confession (Part 2)
programme.desc: In an exclusive prison interview, Timothy McVeigh himself describes how events in his personal life and the world around him inspired him to kill his fellow Americans. We also hear from survivors of the bombing and family members of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Snitch Work
programme.desc: A 4-year-old girl is found murdered, her body placed in a TV box. Years later, a neighbour is arrested for the crime. When an author seeking to write about the death penalty comes across the case, he finds an investigation filled with holes.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Boy's Story
programme.desc: A money order salesman is brutally murdered and two teenage brothers and their best friend are arrested. They spend almost four decades behind bars, until a journalist takes notice of the case and uncovers evidence of the men’s innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: The wife and two children of an Air Force captain are murdered in Fayetteville, North Carolina, and Army sergeant Tim Hennis is sentenced to death for the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Army vet Joe D'Ambrosio is sentenced to death for a 1988 murder. No one listened to his pleas of innocence until Father Neil Kookoothe began investigating the case and discovered a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Paris

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Celebrity Edition: Jewel

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Mayor of Gary, Indiana
programme.desc: The mayor of Gary, Indiana, goes undercover as a municipal employee in her own city. During her shifts, she works with a sanitation employee, a firefighter, a police officer and a beach maintenance crew member.

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Nestle Toll House Cafe by Chips
programme.desc: A no-nonsense COO goes undercover to make sure the future of Nestle Toll House Café by Chip remains sweet but she experiences a sugar crash when she fails to meet her own customer service requirements.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Technicolor Weather
programme.desc: From Sapphire caves to bizarre blue lava and rainbow clouds, this episode exposes the invisible forces behind the strangest, most beautiful events the planet. Featuring forces that eat snow, create perfect clear cubes and cause walrus gatherings.

programme.title: Top Ten: Worst Hurricanes of the 2000s
programme.desc: Fuelled by warm ocean water, they are the most violent and destructive storms on earth. We count down the worst Hurricanes to hit the planet since the start of the new millennium.

programme.title: Top Ten: Weather 'What Ifs'
programme.desc: History is dotted with close calls and near misses that meant the difference between life and death. We countdown the top ten weather 'what ifs.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Snowmobile Desperation
programme.desc: Scott and Vivian Mayo travel to their remote camp outside Cantwell, Alaska. Two days into their trip, Scott heads out alone on his snowmobile to carve trails when he becomes disoriented in heavy fog.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Wild Weather Control
programme.desc: Winter that's one for the record books, a bus that tries to outrun rare Romanian tornado and a shelf cloud that is the stuff of nightmares when wild weather is unleashed.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Texas Flash Flood
programme.desc: A flash flood in the Texas Hill Country kills 13 people and destroys 350 homes. A father watches helplessly as his house is pulled down the river, and his wife and two children are tossed into the current.

programme.title: Top Ten Extreme Jobs
programme.desc: Extreme jobs are not for everyone, but if you're willing to battle raging weather and risk life and limb for your paycheck, you may be a perfect candidate. We are counting down the top ten most extreme jobs on the planet.

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Destinations
programme.desc: From extreme heat, to bone chilling cold, every year millions of us set out on a weather watching adventure. If you love weather like we do, these are the top ten must-see destinations for your travel bucket list.

programme.title: Top Ten Amazing Moments
programme.desc: For more than thirty years, our meteorologists have battled the wildest weather on the planet. They've taken you along for the ride and in the heart of the storm, their reports have kept you informed. We look at ten amazing moments in weather reporting.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Floods and Spiders
programme.desc: Test your knowledge of poisonous spiders, big wave wipeouts, icy hills and tumbleweeds on the attack! Find out if you'd know what to do if you were trapped in a flash flood or small plane crash.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Jellyfish
programme.desc: Looking at the possibilities of surviving a massive avalanche, as well as a terrible sting from a jellyfish. Also featuring footage on deathly heat in the desert, white-water rapids and much more.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving Tornadoes
programme.desc: Video of tornadoes tearing through an airport, a gas station and a trailer park is shown. What do you do when a tornado towers beside your car and how to survive a brutal twister that rips through a city is featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Gators and Ice Tsunami
programme.desc: What would you do if a wall of ice threatened to crush your home? Could you cope being trapped in an elevator? Incredible video pits you against deadly black ice, intense sandstorms, and hungry alligators!

programme.title: AMHQ Weekend
programme.desc: The science and stories of weather, plus in-depth forecasts with a focus on weekend weather.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: The latest news and weather to prepare for the weekend.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Wild Weather Rampage
programme.desc: Duck and take cover, Mother Nature's mad and she's unleashing the very worst of weather.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: It's an eye opening experience when the dead center of extreme weather rolls in and there’s no time to get out of its way.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Surviving the Weather
programme.desc: From monster tornadoes to epic floods, when extreme weather strikes, there's no way to hit back, all we can do is fight to survive nature's onslaught.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Man-Made Earthquakes
programme.desc: Scientists struggle to understand earthquakes, but new research has revealed that earthquakes can be triggered by not just from within the earth, but also by damns and reservoirs, mines and the oil drilling technique called fracking.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Brian
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Nature

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Snuggle Time

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Oh Yeah!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Salty Codgers
programme.desc: Mad Mod steals the youth from Cyborg, Beast Boy, Starfire and Robin, turning them into Raven's favorite type of people: salty codgers. Instead of helping the Titans get their youth back, Raven teaches them how cool old people are.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Knowledge

programme.title: Couples Therapy

programme.title: Movie: Molly's Game

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload
programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami
programme.desc: On a Saturday night when Dorothy is the only one with a date, the other girls are prompted to reminisce about some of the worst dates they have ever had.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: Frasier: Four for the Seesaw
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier's spontaneous gesture of sharing a table with two beautiful women leads them to a double date at a country cabin. Frasier then tries to help Niles overcome the feeling that he's betraying Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: Niles' new apartment building doesn't allow cats or dogs, so Niles get a new cockatoo. However, his decision to throw a party to meet his new neighbours is ruined when the bird attaches itself to Niles' head.

programme.title: Frasier: Ham Radio

programme.desc: Cartman's mom gets help from an expert when she realizes she cannot control her son anymore. The expert, known as 'The Dog Whisperer', may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: South Park: Make Love, Not Warcraft
programme.desc: The actions of a renegade gamer threaten to destroy Blizzard Entertainment's World of Warcraft. The fate of the game now lies in the hands of Cartman and the gang who dedicate their lives to defeating the mad gamer and saving the World of Warcraft.

programme.title: South Park: Mystery of the Urinal Deuce
programme.desc: Cartman exposes the true culprit behind the September 11th attacks, uncovering the world's largest conspiracy of all time. Kyle and Stan hit the road in search of the truth and come face-to-face with the masterminds who pulled off the operation.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: An elementary school teacher in South Park is conducting an illicit affair with a student while Cartman becomes the new school hallway monitor. When a student in his jurisdiction commits an infraction, Cartman takes it a little too personally.

programme.title: South Park: Goobacks
programme.desc: Humans from the year 3045 are traveling to South Park through a recently opened time portal and are looking for work. When they start taking the jobs of true, hard working Americans, the town takes drastic action to save the country.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too, living their dreams through surgery.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Kids
programme.desc: Cartman catches the mysterious Gingervitus, a disease that turns his hair red, lightens his skin and gives him freckles. Sick of being ripped-on because of his new looks, Cartman rallies all ginger kids everywhere to fight against discrimination.

programme.title: South Park: Bloody Mary
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed in front of his friends when his father gets pulled over for driving under the influence of alcohol. Meanwhile, a bleeding statue of Mary is discovered and the faithful are flocking to the site, hoping for miraculous healings.

programme.title: South Park: With Apologies to Jesse Jackson
programme.desc: Randy Marsh tries to find forgiveness after mistakenly using a racial slur on 'Wheel of Fortune.' Meanwhile, Cartman gets into a rumble with an assembly guest.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Sucks
programme.desc: Cartman invites Butters over for the night and plans to do disgusting things to him in his sleep. However, when he photographs Butters' penis in his mouth, there are drastic consequences for both boys.

programme.title: South Park: D-Yikes!
programme.desc: Once again Mrs. Garrison gets dumped. But this time she takes it out on the class. When the bar Mrs. Garrison finds solace in is about to be taken over by Persian club owners, she fights to save the one place that lets her be the woman she is.

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Tourette
programme.desc: Cartman discovers the joys of having Tourette's syndrome. Drunk with the power of saying whatever he wants without getting in trouble for it, he lines up National TV Coverage to take advantage of his new life with no filters.

programme.title: South Park: More Crap
programme.desc: Stan's dad Randy becomes South Park's hometown hero when the guys down at the local bar see the size of his most recent crap. Drunk with his new-found fame, Randy attempts to break a world set by Bono.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle become obsessed with Guitar Hero to the point where they're breaking high score records, and it doesn't take long for Stan to realize that he could go even further with a different partner.

programme.title: South Park: The List
programme.desc: The girls in the fourth grade class have made a secret list that rates every boy's looks from cutest to ugliest. The boys steal the list, but are unprepared to deal with the results.

programme.title: South Park: Tonsil Trouble
programme.desc: After a routine tonsillectomy goes horribly wrong, Cartman comes face to face with his own mortality.

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike
programme.desc: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park: Eek, a Penis!
programme.desc: While Ms. Garrison is off trying to find a way to become the man he was always intended to be, Cartman is put in charge of the classroom.

programme.title: The Closer: The Big Picture

programme.title: The Closer: Show Yourself
programme.desc: The team plays a game of hide-and-seek with a sniper who is targeting gang members.

programme.title: The Closer: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A prominent doctor is murdered in his office while administering an important drug test.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Stamper/ Haggerty
programme.desc: A mom whose heart is in the medieval past and whose head is in the clouds swaps places with a 21st century wife and mother who juggles family life and works two jobs.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Wiggins/ Felix
programme.desc: An African-American mother trades place with a Caucasian mother.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Jeffrey/ Greiner
programme.desc: A high-maintenance former beauty pageant winner who insists on perfection in her palatial home and spoiled daughters swaps places with a junk-collecting, blue-collar mom who believes that grooming and primping are a total waste of time.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Slater/ Williams
programme.desc: A dance-obsessed housewife who maps out every minute of her day and pushes her kids in ballroom dancing competitions swaps with a mother of three who lets her kids eat whatever and whenever and runs her house like the wild, wild West.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Mink and Oaks
programme.desc: Meet Kimberly Mink, a real-life rhinestone cowgirl mom and the world record holder in Women's Big Loop. Kimberly swaps places with Rebecca Oaks, a working mother of two boys who declares that she is the supervisor, manager and CEO of her family in Ohio.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Two Brothers
programme.desc: After an eleven-year old girl is found suffocated with her own underwear, two step-brothers, ages 15 and 19, confess to the murder. But with IQs each under 60, they maintain their innocence and claim their confessions were coerced.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder on the Mountain
programme.desc: An entire family is brutally murdered in their home in California, with their eight-year-old son being the only survivor.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Feds vs. Outlaws
programme.desc: The leader of the notorious Outlaws biker club is accused of a quadruple homicide in Fort Lauderdale. He beats the rap for the murders but is sentenced to death for the car bombing of a federal witness in New Orleans.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Murderous Moms
programme.desc: A front yard brawl between two Euclid, Ohio families leaves one person dead and investigators wondering how teenage heartbreak started it all.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Killer Cop
programme.desc: Rookie police officer James Duckett is sentenced to death for the rape and murder of a young girl. Fourteen years later, a homicide detective gets a letter from Duckett and becomes convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Cruel and Unusual: Botched Executions
programme.desc: Lethal injection has experienced a series of botched executions in several states including Ohio, Arizona, and Oklahoma.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Murderous Moms
programme.desc: A front yard brawl between two Euclid, Ohio families leaves one person dead and investigators wondering how teenage heartbreak started it all.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sex Slaves in Texas
programme.desc: Alfonso Diaz-Juarez is accused of kidnapping young women from Mexico and forcing them into prostitution in Houston cantinas.

programme.desc: The Kilchers scramble to make the most of 22 hours of sunlight. Atz tracks down predators killing the herd. Otto gets creative to help a cow with an udder problem. Eivin builds an outhouse. Atz Lee and Jane are startled while fishing for salmon.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Mobility, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: As the Kilcher family braces for summer on the homestead, Atz Lee treks to forbidding Perl Island for an emergency crash course in wilderness survival. Jane fights with creatures from the deep for food, and Otto and Eivin attempt a homestead sauna build.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Hill Country Hunt

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Kilcher Kraftsmanship
programme.desc: The Kilchers reveal how their own brand of ingenuity has allowed them to survive in the wild.

programme.desc: The old well Marty's come to fix has already claimed a victim. To set the Dagues on a path to self-sufficiency, the Raneys try to deliver a long-term water source, protein supply, and sustainable power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Line of Fire
programme.desc: Marty has to create an evacuation ark for livestock while Matt devises a layer of fire protection to save a homestead in danger of a wildfire.

programme.desc: The Memphis Outlaws finish their race against the Las Vegas racers, but before they can leave town, they get a call from a group of guys in California looking to race. Memphis agrees to stay to race against Cali, but a brawl breaks out before they start.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Rock N' Roll
programme.desc: With racers from Kentucky coming into town, and Heifer still out of commission, JJ decides to put Tricia behind the wheel of Ziptie. Meanwhile, Mustang Mike is fighting for his first win after his crash.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: JJ's Arm Drop
programme.desc: JJ hosts an arm drop race competition and challenges the legendary racer Birdman on the streets of Memphis.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Chase Is a Race
programme.desc: After an exciting round of racing, it's time to move into round two of JJ's Arm Drop. Many of the Memphis racers are moving on, but that means that now they won't be able to avoid racing each other, and only one can leave with all the money.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Cutting It Short
programme.desc: JJ and the Memphis Street Outlaws are back, but after a devastating crash, JJ's son Doughboy questions if he should continue racing.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Don't Play Nice
programme.desc: Racers from St. Louis are in town, and since one of them tried to burn Tricia down, the Memphis Street Outlaws are done playing nice.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Big Money Bets
programme.desc: A group of fast-talking racers from Pennsylvania come to town to race and ready to bet big money. But, after a costly loss, Memphis has to win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Big Comebacks and the Big Apple
programme.desc: When New York comes to town, Memphis tries for a big comeback after last week's big losses.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Doughboy vs. the DMV
programme.desc: On race night, a mouthy group of racers from Delaware, Maryland, and Virginia bring a bad attitude and Doughboy finally lines up for a race.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Odds Against You
programme.desc: JJ and the Memphis Street Outlaws decide to head west to meet up with a group of Arizona racers led by Mary, who they've raced with before.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Dusty Do-Over
programme.desc: After a night of low bets in Arizona, JJ decides to set up another race against racers in New Mexico, hoping for a chance to make more money.

programme.desc: Rosa and Rebecca finally meet at Rilah's baby shower. Tyra isn't comfortable visiting Alex's family with Alex and the baby. McKayla goes to the hospital to be induced. Jessica and Nate find out Chloe and Max broke their only rule.

programme.desc: Mitch and Aspyn announce their engagement and the race is on to find a venue. Then, the whole family goes to Utah to help with the official opening of Meri's Bed and Breakfast. At the opening, Kody drops a hint of some MAJOR changes ahead.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: What to Expect When You're Expecting Six Babies
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric struggle through a high-risk delivery. Six premature babies must survive the NICU and prepare to come home during a national flu crisis. One baby takes a turn for the worse, as the family faces nonstop feedings and mounting expenses.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Houston, We Have a Potty Problem
programme.desc: Danielle is ready to get the girls out of diapers and into underwear, but Adam worries about potty disasters. After months away, Mimi asks to meet up with Danielle. Adam's attempt to bond with the girls at NASA's Space Center does not go as planned.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Every Quint for Herself
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle hope teaching the Quints to share will stop their constant fighting. Blayke has a gymnastics evaluation but one wrong step may cost her the chance to move up. The Busbys step in to help a family hurt by the hurricane.

programme.title: 900 Pound Man: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: At 900 lbs., Ricky is one of the world's largest men. Follow Ricky over three years as he struggles to find a surgeon willing to take on his case and a way off the island of Guam to get the potentially lifesaving surgery he desperately needs.

programme.title: The 685-lb Teen
programme.desc: Justin Williamson is a teenager who weighs 670 lbs and is chasing his musical dreams while fighting for his life. Faced with death or surgery, Justin must transform.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: My Head's Exploding
programme.desc: A patient with a severe headache is seizing, then bruises erupt on her legs and her doctor has no idea why; a naked woman is behaving so oddly that her doctor thinks she's on drugs; and a wrestler has been vomiting for days, and the cause is a shock.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Halloween in the ER
programme.desc: A mysterious white dog wanders the hospital halls on Halloween. A neurologist encounters an unconscious motorcyclist on the side of the road. The treatment of a young boy's broken leg turns into an investigation that might reveal child abuse.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Sisters Lumpity Lump Lump
programme.desc: Amber has hundreds of tumors on her face. Antonio has a mound on his spine and is afraid it might be impossible to remove. Sisters Cheri and Janice both suffer from possibly matching lumps. Tatiana has an embarrassing bump on her butt cheek.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Feuding Families and Broken Hearts
programme.desc: Two notorious gypsy families have been feuding for years, but when one decides to crash the other's party, all bets are off. A young gypsy teen must decide whether or not to stay with her man.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Surprise, You're Getting Married
programme.desc: Nukkie's wedding to Jonas may be in jeopardy after an ex re-enters their lives. When the problems fall onto sister Dallas's shoulders it's a wild race to the altar. Gypsy mom Jett locks horns with her own mother over her little girl's birthday party.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Blowout Sale
programme.desc: Jessica juggles multiple brides. Maria brings three generations of family to her appointment including her opinionated grandma. Pamela is a policewoman who wants a grand ballroom-style dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Daddy-Daughter Dilemma
programme.desc: Caitlin has her fitting now that her father is healthy enough to attend.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Kane Brown
programme.desc: Country music superstar Kane Brown joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about true horror and when dream trucks turn into shattered dream trucks.

programme.title: The First 48: Unnecessary Roughness/ Rules of the Game
programme.desc: In Cincinnati, Ohio a children's Peace Bowl football tournament is interrupted by gunfire, leaving a teenager dead.

programme.title: The First 48: Blood on Bourbon
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a mass shooting on innocent bystanders and tourists in the heart of the French Quarter leaves the city demanding answers.

programme.title: The First 48: Sudden Death/ Devil at the Door
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a man is executed in broad daylight. In Minneapolis, a teenager is murdered at home.

programme.title: Live PD
programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: Live PD
programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins What We Learned in School
programme.desc: Adam shows that Columbus didn't discover America, King Tut was a dud, and the rules of grammar are not as ironclad as you'd think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Emily Ruins Adam
programme.desc: Emily takes over to ruin Adam, debunking IQ tests and pointing out information Adam has gotten wrong in the past. Plus, she explains the backfire effect.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Weddings
programme.desc: A couple's wedding day is here, but Adam's gift of information, like the fact that most wedding 'traditions' were created by consumerism, may rain on the parade.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Death
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam explains that 'the end' is inevitable, shows why immortality is a fantasy, and reveals that the American funeral industry is a racket that exploits mourners' grief and fear of dying.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Out of Wedlock

programme.desc: After a big blow up, Rob admits to Kourtney that he doesn't hang out with her anymore because he hates Scott. Kris thinks Bruce is losing his hearing and insists he sees a doctor.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kendall Goes on Birth Control
programme.desc: Bruce finds out Kendall is taking birth control and decides it's time to talk about the birds and bees. Kim discovers a serious rash on her legs and fears her career may be over.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Have and Have Nots
programme.desc: Bruce teaches Kendall and Kylie a lesson about how fortunate they are. When Kris's incontinence issues get worse, Khloé and Kourtney tease her until she agrees to do something about it.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: What Happens in Vegas, Stays in Vegas
programme.desc: Scott goes to Vegas for a club appearance, and Kourtney fears he'll revert back to his old ways. Kylie and Kendall grow annoyed when Kris decides to be more involved in their lives.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Talk to My Agent
programme.desc: After being humiliated on 'Dancing with the Stars' and on stage with Prince, Kim decides she wants to learn to dance. Scott tries to become Kylie and Kendall's manager, which angers Kris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Family Vacation
programme.desc: Bruce takes the family to Bora Bora to celebrate his 20th anniversary with Kris. Kim's new boyfriend, Kris Humphries, pushes Kim too far, upsetting the family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Kris decides to pursue a DNA test to prove Khloe's paternity. Kourtney angers Kim when she takes over relocating DASH and Bruce goes to extremes to get the family's attention.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Momager Dearest
programme.desc: Kourt takes her grudge against Kris to a new level. Kim wants payback after Bruce forces her to overcome her fears and Kendall and Kylie start working for Seventeen Magazine.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Everybody's Wigging Out
programme.desc: Rob hurts Bruce's feelings when he says he never had a male role model growing up. Kris' road rage gets to be too much and the family thinks Kim's lost it when she starts wearing wigs.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: We're talking everything Emmys. Plus, we have 'Downton Abbey' star Elizabeth McGovern joining us in studio.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Out With the Old, In With the New
programme.desc: Even though things are changing for the Kardashian family in ways they never expected, they are determined to remember that family always comes first.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A New York Family Affair

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Significant Others and Significant Brothers
