programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter
programme.desc: The dive team assists at an event in Hampton Beach, while Officer Courtney patrols the area's clam flats. Officers Hannett and Holmes patrol snowmobile activity across the state. And Officer Demler helps a bobcat that's been injured by a porcupine.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Riverside Stakeout
programme.desc: Nature lovers show up for Discover Wild New Hampshire Day. Officers conduct an undercover surveillance. Officer McKee rescues a starving owl from the side of the road. Later on, Mount Monadnock, a perilous rescue of an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Toughest Cases
programme.desc: On this special episode, Lieutenant Bill Boudreau and the New Hampshire Conservation Officers look back at some of their toughest cases. From slippery suspects to volatile violators, they reflect on what it takes to get the truth.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Season Five Sneak Peek
programme.desc: The the Texas Game Wardens are back and have their hands full every day, protecting both animals and citizens.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Don't Feed the Bears
programme.desc: Officer Joe Canfield investigates a home with multiple bear feeding complaints and finds more than he bargained for. Officer Egan investigates an abandoned car and missing persons case. And Officers respond to a drowning in the Connecticut River.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Lights! Croc! Action!
programme.desc: Get a behind the scenes look at Steve and Terri's new movie as they try to act.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Chilled Out Pups
programme.desc: Tempest, a hostess at a dog spa must teach her ten Whippet pups the path to tranquillity. A mixed breed pup tries to find his place among his trio of sisters. And, a litter of 13 Black Russian Terriers turn their mom's serene life upside down.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Cats in Isolation
programme.desc: Jackson deals with four cats that are constantly at each other's throats; the Cat Daddy visits the Living Free Animal Sanctuary's cattery where territorial issues have forced two cats to live in isolation for years.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: On the Edge of Nowhere
programme.desc: Dr. Dee and her husband Ken help the remote villages of Alaska by hosting a vet clinic in a town of just 107 residents. Back at Animal House, Dr. Dee has a life or death emergency on her hands with an akita apparently suffering from a gunshot wound.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: At Home with Wolves
programme.desc: A young girl hopes that Dr. Jeff can save her puppy from a deadly virus. The team treats a stray cat with a life-threatening injury. And Dr. Jeff must gain the trust of rescued wolves to help an ailing member of the pack.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Mate for Life
programme.desc: The health and love life of Chester's Penguin Island's oldest penguin could be in jeopardy. One of the zoo's most dangerous families is on the move and keepers prepare to welcome two orphan sun bears to the zoo.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: From the Ashes
programme.desc: A local woman calls Tia to surrender puppies that she can't care for anymore, but Tia is shocked by what she finds. Months after their house was destroyed in a fire, M2 and Kanani prepare to move into their new home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: My Underdog Life
programme.desc: Lizzy and Marcel team up to catch a stray pit bull on the streets near the rescue. A family to be visit Villalobos to adopt a dog that will complete the family unit. And after eight years of toil, Tia reveals the publication of her first book.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Circle of Life
programme.desc: In the season finale, big changes are on the horizon for The Last Alaskans. Heimo and Edna get a surprise from their daughter Krin, Tyler and Ashley get a taste of their future life and Charlie's sister prepares to leave for town.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hit the Ground Hunting
programme.desc: Heimo stalks his best hunting grounds and Tyler tracks caribou as the pressure is on to get a big kill before the harsh Alaskan winter takes hold. Charlie inspects his traplines but damage from summer wildfires puts his season in jeopardy.

programme.title: Movie: Sister Act 2: Back in the Habit
programme.desc: Lounge singer Deloris returns to the convent to help choral students save their school.

programme.title: Movie: National Security

programme.title: Movie: Welcome Home, Roscoe Jenkins
programme.desc: A successful Los Angeles talk show host heads home to the Deep South to reunite with his family. Once there, he learns how easy it is fall back into old rivalries.

programme.title: Martin: I'm Not Your Superwoman

programme.title: Martin: Woman With a Past

programme.title: Martin: The Parents Are Coming

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: Friendly Fire

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: Home Suite Home

programme.title: A Different World: Those Who Can't ... Tutor

programme.title: A Different World: War of the Words

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Aunt Who Came to Dinner

programme.title: Martin: The Great Payne Robbery

programme.title: Martin: Radio Days

programme.title: Martin: Blackboard Jungle Fever

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins What We Learned in School
programme.desc: Adam shows that Columbus didn't discover America, King Tut was a dud, and the rules of grammar are not as ironclad as you'd think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Emily Ruins Adam
programme.desc: Emily takes over to ruin Adam, debunking IQ tests and pointing out information Adam has gotten wrong in the past. Plus, she explains the backfire effect.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Weddings
programme.desc: A couple's wedding day is here, but Adam's gift of information, like the fact that most wedding 'traditions' were created by consumerism, may rain on the parade.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Death
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam explains that 'the end' is inevitable, shows why immortality is a fantasy, and reveals that the American funeral industry is a racket that exploits mourners' grief and fear of dying.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Rock N' Roll
programme.desc: With racers from Kentucky coming into town, and Heifer still out of commission, JJ decides to put Tricia behind the wheel of Ziptie. Meanwhile, Mustang Mike is fighting for his first win after his crash.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: JJ's Arm Drop
programme.desc: JJ hosts an arm drop race competition and challenges the legendary racer Birdman on the streets of Memphis.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Chase Is a Race
programme.desc: After an exciting round of racing, it's time to move into round two of JJ's Arm Drop. Many of the Memphis racers are moving on, but that means that now they won't be able to avoid racing each other, and only one can leave with all the money.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Cutting It Short
programme.desc: JJ and the Memphis Street Outlaws are back, but after a devastating crash, JJ's son Doughboy questions if he should continue racing.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Don't Play Nice
programme.desc: Racers from St. Louis are in town, and since one of them tried to burn Tricia down, the Memphis Street Outlaws are done playing nice.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Big Money Bets
programme.desc: A group of fast-talking racers from Pennsylvania come to town to race and ready to bet big money. But, after a costly loss, Memphis has to win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Big Comebacks and the Big Apple
programme.desc: When New York comes to town, Memphis tries for a big comeback after last week's big losses.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Doughboy vs. the DMV

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Odds Against You

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Dusty Do-Over
programme.desc: After a night of low bets in Arizona, JJ decides to set up another race against racers in New Mexico, hoping for a chance to make more money.

programme.title: American Pickers: Scrappy Go Lucky

programme.title: American Pickers: Pedal Pushers

programme.title: American Pickers: Rat Rod Rolls

programme.title: American Pickers: Bonus Buys: Rock Star Wheels
programme.desc: The guys overhaul Aerosmith's legendary tour van, right on time for a visit from Rock'n'Roll royalty. Then, a star-struck Frank meets one of his teen idols.

programme.title: Futurama: The Cryonic Woman
programme.desc: While working Leela's old job, Fry opens a random tube and discovers that his girlfriend from 1999 was frozen shortly after him.

programme.title: Futurama: Parasites Lost
programme.desc: Fry ingests 'intelligent worms' from a sandwich that he bought from a vending machine.

programme.title: Futurama: Amazon Women in the Mood
programme.desc: Zap Brannigan and Kif take Leela and Amy on a double half-date, but Zap crashes the restaurant ship on Planet Amazonia and discovers a race of giant women ruled by a feminine computer known as Femputer.

programme.title: Futurama: Bendless Love
programme.desc: A strike at the bending plant puts Bender into close contact with the sexy robot Angleyne.

programme.title: Futurama: The Honking
programme.desc: When Bender's uncle dies, he leaves him his gothic castle, but with some conditions.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nothing in the Dark
programme.desc: An elderly woman is haunted by her frequent fear of death knocking on her door incognito.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: One More Pallbearer

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dead Man's Shoes
programme.desc: When a man puts on the shoes of a dead gangster, he is possessed by the gangster's ghost.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hunt
programme.desc: A man and his dog wake up the morning after a hunt to a sombre sight of their dead bodies.

programme.title: Movie: Shadows of the Dead
programme.desc: A group of teens try to escape a shadow monster.

programme.title: Movie: 3-Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: The world's greatest killing machine is three times as deadly when a mutated shark originating from the Great Pacific garbage patch eats its way through an island research facility.

programme.title: Movie: 5-Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: The tropical beaches of Puerto Rico turn deadly when a 5-headed shark invades the waters.

programme.title: Movie: 6-Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: A marriage boot camp on a remote island turns into a deadly nightmare when a 6-headead shark starts attacking the beach.

programme.title: Movie: Resident Evil: Retribution
programme.desc: Alice reveals her past after she wakes up in the Umbrella's operations facility.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins What We Learned in School
programme.desc: Adam shows that Columbus didn't discover America, King Tut was a dud, and the rules of grammar are not as ironclad as you'd think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Emily Ruins Adam
programme.desc: Emily takes over to ruin Adam, debunking IQ tests and pointing out information Adam has gotten wrong in the past. Plus, she explains the backfire effect.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Weddings
programme.desc: A couple's wedding day is here, but Adam's gift of information, like the fact that most wedding 'traditions' were created by consumerism, may rain on the parade.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Death
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam explains that 'the end' is inevitable, shows why immortality is a fantasy, and reveals that the American funeral industry is a racket that exploits mourners' grief and fear of dying.

programme.desc: A guy with a rogue beer slingshot, a grown man losing a battle with a piñata, Filipino friends freaking out over Miss Universe and more.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 15
programme.desc: A Russian wedding crasher, an exploding birthday cake, a table-dance gone horribly wrong, some out-of-control baseball fans and much more.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: In Case What?
programme.desc: Find out which illusion Michael learned as a kid in magic camp, if he has ever burned himself with a trick, and which horror movie inspired one of his creepiest tricks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Just a Miker
programme.desc: Find out when Michael's favourite time to avoid contact is, which prank was almost too silly for him to go through with and what bug-infested prop wound up in a dining room.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the Carbonaro Effect.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: I Am Oglethorpe
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the Carbonaro Effect.

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: The boys set up the 'Awesome Talent Agency' and pool all their resources to impress their first client only to have an agency run by the Chinese Mafia steal her away.

programme.title: South Park: Marjorine
programme.desc: The boys are on a secret mission to find out exactly what happens behind closed doors when the fourth grade girls have a sleepover. The plan is simple: fake Butters' death, resurrect him as a girl, and infiltrate this age-old feminine tradition.

programme.title: South Park: Trapped in the Closet
programme.desc: Scientologists converge on Stan's house after he is identified as the reincarnation of L. Ron Hubbard. One A-lister locks himself in the closet and refuses to come out, after Stan criticizes his 'talent.'

programme.title: South Park: ManBearPig
programme.desc: The boys are trapped in a cave and Cartman finds a treasure. Meanwhile, Al Gore shows up in town to warn the citizens about the threat of ManBearPig.

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Cartman's mom gets help from an expert when she realizes she cannot control her son anymore. The expert, known as 'The Dog Whisperer', may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: South Park: Make Love, Not Warcraft
programme.desc: The actions of a renegade gamer threaten to destroy Blizzard Entertainment's World of Warcraft. The fate of the game now lies in the hands of Cartman and the gang who dedicate their lives to defeating the mad gamer and saving the World of Warcraft.

programme.title: South Park: Mystery of the Urinal Deuce
programme.desc: Cartman exposes the true culprit behind the September 11th attacks, uncovering the world's largest conspiracy of all time. Kyle and Stan hit the road in search of the truth and come face-to-face with the masterminds who pulled off the operation.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: An elementary school teacher in South Park is conducting an illicit affair with a student while Cartman becomes the new school hallway monitor. When a student in his jurisdiction commits an infraction, Cartman takes it a little too personally.

programme.title: South Park: Goobacks
programme.desc: Humans from the year 3045 are traveling to South Park through a recently opened time portal and are looking for work. When they start taking the jobs of true, hard working Americans, the town takes drastic action to save the country.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too, living their dreams through surgery.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Kids
programme.desc: Cartman catches the mysterious Gingervitus, a disease that turns his hair red, lightens his skin and gives him freckles. Sick of being ripped-on because of his new looks, Cartman rallies all ginger kids everywhere to fight against discrimination.

programme.title: South Park: Bloody Mary
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed in front of his friends when his father gets pulled over for driving under the influence of alcohol. Meanwhile, a bleeding statue of Mary is discovered and the faithful are flocking to the site, hoping for miraculous healings.

programme.title: South Park: With Apologies to Jesse Jackson
programme.desc: Randy Marsh tries to find forgiveness after mistakenly using a racial slur on 'Wheel of Fortune.' Meanwhile, Cartman gets into a rumble with an assembly guest.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Sucks
programme.desc: Cartman invites Butters over for the night and plans to do disgusting things to him in his sleep. However, when he photographs Butters' penis in his mouth, there are drastic consequences for both boys.

programme.title: South Park: D-Yikes!
programme.desc: Once again Mrs. Garrison gets dumped. But this time she takes it out on the class. When the bar Mrs. Garrison finds solace in is about to be taken over by Persian club owners, she fights to save the one place that lets her be the woman she is.

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Tourette
programme.desc: Cartman discovers the joys of having Tourette's syndrome. Drunk with the power of saying whatever he wants without getting in trouble for it, he lines up National TV Coverage to take advantage of his new life with no filters.

programme.title: South Park: More Crap
programme.desc: Stan's dad Randy becomes South Park's hometown hero when the guys down at the local bar see the size of his most recent crap. Drunk with his new-found fame, Randy attempts to break a world set by Bono.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle become obsessed with Guitar Hero to the point where they're breaking high score records, and it doesn't take long for Stan to realize that he could go even further with a different partner.

programme.title: South Park: The List
programme.desc: The girls in the fourth grade class have made a secret list that rates every boy's looks from cutest to ugliest. The boys steal the list, but are unprepared to deal with the results.

programme.title: South Park: Tonsil Trouble
programme.desc: After a routine tonsillectomy goes horribly wrong, Cartman comes face to face with his own mortality.

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike
programme.desc: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park: Eek, a Penis!
programme.desc: While Ms. Garrison is off trying to find a way to become the man he was always intended to be, Cartman is put in charge of the classroom.

programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Don't Feed the Bears
programme.desc: Officer Joe Canfield investigates a home with multiple bear feeding complaints and finds more than he bargained for. Officer Egan investigates an abandoned car and missing persons case. And Officers respond to a drowning in the Connecticut River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Toughest Cases
programme.desc: On this special episode, Lieutenant Bill Boudreau and the New Hampshire Conservation Officers look back at some of their toughest cases. From slippery suspects to volatile violators, they reflect on what it takes to get the truth.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Lights! Croc! Action!
programme.desc: Get a behind the scenes look at Steve and Terri's new movie as they try to act.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Chilled Out Pups
programme.desc: Tempest, a hostess at a dog spa must teach her ten Whippet pups the path to tranquillity. A mixed breed pup tries to find his place among his trio of sisters. And, a litter of 13 Black Russian Terriers turn their mom's serene life upside down.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Cats in Isolation
programme.desc: Jackson deals with four cats that are constantly at each other's throats; the Cat Daddy visits the Living Free Animal Sanctuary's cattery where territorial issues have forced two cats to live in isolation for years.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: On the Edge of Nowhere
programme.desc: Dr. Dee and her husband Ken help the remote villages of Alaska by hosting a vet clinic in a town of just 107 residents. Back at Animal House, Dr. Dee has a life or death emergency on her hands with an akita apparently suffering from a gunshot wound.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: At Home with Wolves
programme.desc: A young girl hopes that Dr. Jeff can save her puppy from a deadly virus. The team treats a stray cat with a life-threatening injury. And Dr. Jeff must gain the trust of rescued wolves to help an ailing member of the pack.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Mate for Life
programme.desc: The health and love life of Chester's Penguin Island's oldest penguin could be in jeopardy. One of the zoo's most dangerous families is on the move and keepers prepare to welcome two orphan sun bears to the zoo.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: From the Ashes
programme.desc: A local woman calls Tia to surrender puppies that she can't care for anymore, but Tia is shocked by what she finds. Months after their house was destroyed in a fire, M2 and Kanani prepare to move into their new home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: My Underdog Life
programme.desc: Lizzy and Marcel team up to catch a stray pit bull on the streets near the rescue. A family to be visit Villalobos to adopt a dog that will complete the family unit. And after eight years of toil, Tia reveals the publication of her first book.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Circle of Life
programme.desc: In the season finale, big changes are on the horizon for The Last Alaskans. Heimo and Edna get a surprise from their daughter Krin, Tyler and Ashley get a taste of their future life and Charlie's sister prepares to leave for town.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hit the Ground Hunting
programme.desc: Heimo stalks his best hunting grounds and Tyler tracks caribou as the pressure is on to get a big kill before the harsh Alaskan winter takes hold. Charlie inspects his traplines but damage from summer wildfires puts his season in jeopardy.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Russian Yeti: The Killer Lives: Blood in the Snow
programme.desc: New clues into the disappearance of nine students in the remote mountains of Siberia sends a group of experts on a dangerous expedition to investigate if the Yeti was behind the brutal killings.

programme.title: Russian Yeti: The Killer Lives
programme.desc: In 1959, nine Russian students died mysteriously while hiking. Explorer Mike Libecki reinvestigates the mystery and finds clues suggesting the cause of the horrific deaths could be the work of a creature thought only to exist in folklore: the Yeti.

programme.title: Hurricane Man: The Doomsday Twins
programme.desc: When a pair of deadly typhoons threatens Japan, an expert storm-chaser uses cutting-edge tech to hunt these powerful storms and measure their impact.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.desc: After a drug deal goes wrong, a man is shot and collapses behind a dumpster, ending up on life support. A couple are wanted in connection to this attempted murder.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Gun Store Heist
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, Virginia, almost 30 handguns were stolen after thieves broke through the roof of a gun store. Detectives try to secure the firearms before the thieves have time to sell the guns on the streets.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets
programme.desc: Stolen jeep followed; individuals are captured and a gun is recovered.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Devil on One Shoulder
programme.desc: The task force finds the streets of Newark busier than ever during a rainstorm. An unexpected surprise forces the unit into pursuit. A crazy driver puts the unit's wet-weather skills to the test.

programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.desc: Deputy Mendez and the Fugitive Task Force search for a career criminal before another victim is robbed, assaulted, or worse.

programme.desc: Task Force is looking for a woman promoting prostitution of young children.

programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez has two conflicting tips about where a sexual offender may be.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime Family
programme.desc: A profile of infamous mob boss Vito Genovese and how he built the most ruthless and powerful crime family in the nation. Includes interviews with Genovese's godson, FBI agents and prosecutors.

programme.title: American Justice: A Questionable Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Naramore was convicted of attempting to murder a 78-year-old terminally ill woman.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Police officers Robb and Bethany find themselves in an armed standoff with a suspect who has holed up in an apartment complex. Meanwhile, Fire Rescue team Mayville and Stokes must put out a trailer fire that threatens to incinerate the rest of the park.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Officers Roni and Cooper find themselves in a breathless foot chase after people are stabbed at a nightclub. Fire rescue's Doug and Stokes desperately try to save the life of a young man shot in his throat. A carjacking leads to a manhunt.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: The war on drugs continues as Sergeants Chip Huth and Paul Hamilton combine their squads to take down a meth lab. After suiting up in high-tech protective gear and heading into the potentially deadly situations, things get tense.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Sr. Corporal Steve Claggett and other SWAT members practice their explosive breaching skills. Then, Steve rushes to the scene of an armed barricade where two suspects have allegedly robbed a convenience store.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Trust No One
programme.desc: When martial arts enthusiast Carl Hunt suffers a fatal knife wound to the gut, his friends and neighbors offer few viable leads. But Kenda discovers a cache of blood evidence that proves he's being lied to.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: Events earlier in the day lead to a card game halted by gunfire and a young man's death. Also, when Lt. Joe Kenda responds to a double shooting, he and his team find themselves reminiscing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood From a Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. Then when a toddler is kidnapped for ransom, Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a race against time.

programme.title: American Monster: Anything for You
programme.desc: The Snyders are thrilled when their 34-year-old son Mike finally starts a family with his sweetheart - as seen in these home videos. But after being diagnosed with a terrible illness, Mike vanishes. Only years later does his horrific fate comes to light.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: New Mexico Desert Killings
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes from a New Mexico convenience store, two detectives discover tracks in the dirt that may lead them to answers. After a second woman disappears, it's a race against time to stop a potential serial killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Into the Swamp
programme.desc: At a family-run construction company, brothers and cousins work hard together - and play even harder. But when one of them vanishes, no one has answers. The mystery of his disappearance - and the salacious betrayal behind it - isn't solved for 20 years.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: New Mexico Desert Killings
programme.desc: When a young woman vanishes from a New Mexico convenience store, two detectives discover tracks in the dirt that may lead them to answers. After a second woman disappears, it's a race against time to stop a potential serial killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Into the Swamp
programme.desc: At a family-run construction company, brothers and cousins work hard together - and play even harder. But when one of them vanishes, no one has answers. The mystery of his disappearance - and the salacious betrayal behind it - isn't solved for 20 years.

programme.title: American Monster: Anything for You
programme.desc: The Snyders are thrilled when their 34-year-old son Mike finally starts a family with his sweetheart - as seen in these home videos. But after being diagnosed with a terrible illness, Mike vanishes. Only years later does his horrific fate comes to light.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Something Is Different About Robbie
programme.desc: Though Ronald Hawkins and Candace Sims knew that their son Robbie was different from an early age, they were unprepared for the violent act that Robbie would commit, a crime that shook the nation. Now they talk about it all on camera.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: Tiffany Shore grew up knowing that her father was evil, but she still kept his secrets. When Tiffany finally escapes him, she is devastated to discover that has committed far more heinous acts than she ever imagined or knew about.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Pack Mentality
programme.desc: A single mother gets along with her handyman neighbor, until she gets a new man in her life and he becomes the owner of over fifty dogs. Accusations become threats, threats become attacks, and eventually the conflict comes to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of the Rising Gun
programme.desc: A single mother of four children finds the perfect house in New Orleans -- complete with a nice family next door. All is well until a robbery at the neighbor's home leads first to misunderstanding, then to paranoia, conflict and horrible bloodshed.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: Two neighbors in New Brighton, Minnesota get along great until one of them catches Lyme Disease from the deer the other feeds on his property. The ensuing blame game, hostility and rising conflict ends in gunfire, death, injury and ruin.

programme.title: Dateline: Prime Suspect
programme.desc: It's cold case of a mother who just one day disappeared. Her husband John was a suspect from the very start, but there was no evidence linking him to the crime. A mystery that took over 16 years to solve takes center stage in a California courtroom.

programme.title: Dateline: Shattered Bonds
programme.desc: Stephen Moore was a speed skater with little direction in life, until he fell for teacher Kathleen Dorsett. When he went missing, it was a puzzle. Then police found his secret audio diary. Clues came pouring out and a bigger mystery was revealed.

programme.title: Dateline: A Family's Story
programme.desc: Reporting on the recent developments in the Susan Powell case, including the murder-suicide committed by her husband.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Under My Thumb
programme.desc: From the womb, the Cormier twins are partners in mischief. But as they get older, their innocent antics devolve into a much darker game. Soon, the battle for reality and fantasy bleeds into real life threatening to tear the twins apart.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Honor Roll Killers
programme.desc: Twin sisters Jas and Tas Whitehead are the apple of their mother's eye. These beauties seem to have it all, until they turn from fun girls to belligerent teens. When their mother tries to set them on track, the twins push back with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Twins Betty and Peggy Woods survived an abusive home in rural Alabama. Years later, Peggy and Betty, stark opposites, are both tragically caught up in a sorted murder-for-hire plot. And only the hit man knows which twin was guilty.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Family Curse
programme.desc: Identical twins Jordan and Simon Gann had potential in their youth. But as teens they take a dark turn. Soon small lies and thievery give way to a global crime spree where the twins exploit the vulnerabilities of others in a cruel and twisted game.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Breaking Point
programme.desc: In Kerrville, Texas, a long-simmering family feud takes a deadly turn when suspicions and tempers take over. It's a decades-long drama with a shocking ending that nobody sees coming.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: The Battle of Italy
programme.desc: In 1943, tanks of the Canadian Armoured Corps make their combat debut on the European mainland. This is the story of the Canadian tankers who fight their way up the Italian peninsula in the push to liberate Rome from Nazi occupation.

programme.title: Black OPS: Operation Certain Death
programme.desc: In 2000 a unit of the British Army takes a wrong turn on patrol in Sierra Leone. They are held up by the 'West Side Boys', a notorious gang of rebels in West Africa.

programme.title: Black OPS: City Under Siege
programme.desc: Mumbai is under bloody attack and only one Special Force has the know-how and training to take the terrorists to task. In November 2008, an undisclosed number of assassins went on a three-day rampage of death and destruction in India's largest city.

programme.title: Black OPS: Taking Down Bin Laden
programme.desc: The story of how US Navy Seals brought to an end the hunt for the most wanted man in the world.

programme.title: Black OPS: Operation Thunderbolt
programme.desc: Terrorists hijacked a plane in 1976 and took the passengers hostage in an old terminal in Entebbe Uganda. It was up to Israel's top black ops team to save the hostages.

programme.title: Black OPS: Assault on Al-Qaeda
programme.desc: Al-Zarqawi, the most wanted man in Iraq, is proving a formidable enemy. Responsible for bombings, beheadings and attacks, he's more persistent than Saddam and more active than Osama. The coalition's only hope lies with a top secret task force.

programme.title: Black OPS: Night of Terror
programme.desc: In October 2002 Russia's elite force, Spetnaz Group Alfa, face an impossible task: rescue 800 people held hostage by Chechen gunmen and suicide bombers inside a Moscow theater. Negotiations have failed and innocent lives hang in the balance.

programme.title: Black OPS: Operation Thunderbolt
programme.desc: Terrorists hijacked a plane in 1976 and took the passengers hostage in an old terminal in Entebbe Uganda. It was up to Israel's top black ops team to save the hostages.

programme.desc: In October 2002 Russia's elite force, Spetnaz Group Alfa, face an impossible task: rescue 800 people held hostage by Chechen gunmen and suicide bombers inside a Moscow theater. Negotiations have failed and innocent lives hang in the balance.

programme.title: Black OPS: Taking Down Bin Laden
programme.desc: The story of how US Navy Seals brought to an end the hunt for the most wanted man in the world.

programme.title: Black OPS: Operation Certain Death
programme.desc: In 2000 a unit of the British Army takes a wrong turn on patrol in Sierra Leone. They are held up by the 'West Side Boys', a notorious gang of rebels in West Africa.

programme.title: Black OPS: City Under Siege
programme.desc: Mumbai is under bloody attack and only one Special Force has the know-how and training to take the terrorists to task. In November 2008, an undisclosed number of assassins went on a three-day rampage of death and destruction in India's largest city.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Island Life: Perfect House And Boat On Fenwick Island
programme.desc: Follow everyday families in search of their own slice of paradise.

programme.title: Island Life: Kidding Around On James Island
programme.desc: Two Chicago teachers discovered James Island during a spring break trip to Charleston and knew it was the perfect place to raise a family. They love its proximity to a major city, as well as to beaches, farms and even goat yoga.

programme.title: Home Town: A House With History
programme.desc: Will, Courtney and their boys have outgrown their starter home, so they enlist Ben and Erin to help them find their forever house. On their wish list is a sizeable, historic house that's rich in character and small town charm.

programme.title: Home Town: Cottage Charm
programme.desc: Coy and Kenya are moving to town to be close to their children and grandchildren. As empty nesters, they want to downsize into a historic cottage with an all-in budget of $125,000.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Sophistication
programme.desc: A couple that's moving back to Mississippi is looking for a spacious home for under $260,000 where they can host friends and throw parties.

programme.title: Home Town: Sweet Home Laurel
programme.desc: A Laurel, MS, native is ready to plant roots in the place her family has called home for generations. With her all-in budget of $100,000, Erin and Ben create a beautiful transformation that includes a quaint home office and a master bedroom.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Couple Contemplates Turning Their Townhome Into Their Future Home or Finding Something New
programme.desc: A couple contemplates the future of their townhome.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Pool House Problems
programme.desc: Stew and Alan have been together for 21 years and love to entertain. Alan loves the memories they have created raising three boys but now that Stew is retired and spending more time in the house, he is noticing how small and dated their space has become.

programme.title: Love It or List It: As Their Children Become Teenagers, a Couple Realizes That They Lack Space and Privacy
programme.desc: A family is in need of more space for their teenagers.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Starter Home Stagnation
programme.desc: A couple once excited by the potential of their family starter home has now grown tired of its cookie-cutter concept and lack of space. Hilary greets the challenge of finding space, while David tries to find a new neighbourhood for them to love.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Design Intervention
programme.desc: After a couple hurriedly bought their first home together, their family grew to include a three-year-old daughter and two younger twin boys.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Battle-Ready
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his assistant, Katherine, work in Texas while the guys build a cabin in Virginia with their favorite crane operator, Mark Battle.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Wedding
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders get ready for a farm wedding by building a barnwood dance floor, a timber-frame photo booth and an incredible handcrafted wedding arbor.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Boneyard Makeover
programme.desc: The team transforms the Boneyard by enclosing part of their shed with walls so they can work year-round, finishing off their new workspace by covering one wall with multi-colored barn wood.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Johnny Jett Special
programme.desc: Machinist, artist and craftsman Johnny Jett is honoured by The Barnwood Builders in this one-hour special. Johnny's most unforgettable moments are highlighted as well as previously unaired footage featuring West Virginia's favorite Renaissance man.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Operation Hero
programme.desc: Mark and his team take on their hardest build ever for their most important client: America's wounded warriors. The guys work side by side with veterans to construct a giant timber frame lodge for Project Healing Waters.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Cottage
programme.desc: The guys turn a brand new storage shed into an 1800s log cabin, then drive it to Round Top, Texas. Mark gets a lesson from a local silversmith, and the team visits historic structures built around the state by 19th-century pioneers.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Tews Job
programme.desc: Matt and Tina are ready to make their outdated, barely functional master bathroom beautiful again. However, their execution of this project turns out to be much harder than either of them expected.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Craftsman Inside and Out
programme.desc: Newlyweds ask Ally to build them a Craftsman kitchen that matches the rest of their house. While she's at it, they've also asked her to turn their mud pit of a backyard into one that's fit for entertaining.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Wine Lovers' Bread Truck
programme.desc: A couple of vineyard workers break the rental cycle by transforming a vintage bread truck into the tiny home of their dreams in the middle of California wine country.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Island Retreat
programme.desc: A Hawaii couple with four adopted children wants their own tiny house retreat where they can relax and recharge. Set on 20 acres of property high in the Hawaiian mountains, they want their 300-square-foot design to feel like a peaceful sanctuary.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Hawaiian Jungle Smart Home
programme.desc: An outdoorsy couple living in Hawaii finds a beautiful gem of a property on Oahu's windward side where they plan to build their own smart tiny house. Nestled in the Hawaiian jungle, their modern design even features a private outdoor shower.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Mountain View Hobbit Home
programme.desc: A family plans to build a low-impact hobbit house that capitalizes on breathtaking views and overlooks their barn in the mountains of North Carolina.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: After feeling the need to downsize and live simply, a woman and her best friend decide to build a tiny home in the jungle paradise of Hilo, HI. While their dreams of a tiny Hawaiian hideaway are big, both lack adequate construction experience.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Natural Tropical Refuge
programme.desc: A furniture builder and master craftsman use foraged and reclaimed materials to build a special indoor-outdoor tiny house for his family of four in Kauai.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Lakeside Getaway
programme.desc: A young couple in Lakeside, Montana, is downsizing to a tiny cabin in the woods. Set against a gorgeous backdrop, this cozy A-frame cabin offers a skylight for stargazing, a suspended hammock bed, a stone fireplace and hidden art storage.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Man Cave
programme.desc: Joe Donovan, an avid skier and adventurer, has found the perfect spot for his permanent base camp on a remote ridge in southwest Montana. Follow the adventure as he battles the elements to build his rustic, straw bale, dream cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Spearfish Canyon
programme.desc: Deep in the backwoods of Spearfish Canyon, South Dakota's premier off-grid builder Jared Capp sets out to turn four shipping containers into a stunning two-storey mountain hideaway.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yurts So Good
programme.desc: Follow a young couple as they prep their own land and break ground to build their ultimate luxury yurt in the woods of Montana.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Sweet And Savory Duos
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites three teams of sweet and savory duos to put their chemistry to the test.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Jrs.
programme.desc: When four culinary juniors come to Flavortown, someone could get schooled. First up, the kids use items from Flavortown's sample tables to make a 'school lunch remix.' Next, our young chefs weigh their ingredient options in their international dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Single-aisle Showdowns
programme.desc: Four chefs find that even the biggest aisle can still be limiting if it's the only one they can shop. The chefs are challenged to make a hot lunch, comfort food and a dinner spread.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Reheated: A Little Goes a Long Way
programme.desc: In the penultimate week of boot camp, the remaining recruits battle it out for their spot in the finale. First, they're each given $15 and 20 minutes to scour Aldi supermarket for the ingredient.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Two Cooks, One Prize
programme.desc: The final two recruits are taught how to make a three-course, restaurant-quality meal they'll have to recreate in order to impress the judges and win the $25,000 grand prize.

programme.title: Good Eats: Date Tripper
programme.desc: Alton tells everything you need to know to get dates into your culinary life, including three recipes for the 1960s classic 'Devils on Horseback' and a very 'scrummy' sticky toffee pudding.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: New Favorites
programme.desc: For Ree Drummond, it's out with the old and in with new favorites that are all quick and easy. She makes over a cowboy classic, Flank Steak with Herb Sauce and Three-Cheese Waffle Hash Browns.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Hot New Tricks
programme.desc: The Kitchen shares the hottest new tips and tricks for summer cooking with Jeff's BBQ beer can burger and Katie's gnocchi pesto pasta salad. Plus, learn fresh new ways to use up summer zucchini and get three twists on frozen cocktails.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Perfect Plate of Fall
programme.desc: Autumn flavours are in the spotlight as 'The Kitchen' serves a plate of fall favourites. Geoffrey shares his apple cider salmon and Katie Lee makes a brown butter safe butternut squash bake. Plus, learn easy fall appetizers with Sunny.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fresh Start to Fall
programme.desc: The Kitchen is starting things off fresh for the fall season with new dishes like Katie Lee's chicken parmesan zucchini boats and hasselback apples.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Take Five
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making four meals on four days, and they all have just five ingredients. For breakfast, she whips up Chilaquiles, a Mexican breakfast with Osage County style.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Alex's 16th Birthday
programme.desc: There's a big secret on the ranch -- a surprise 16th birthday party for Alex with family, friends and all her favourite food.

programme.title: Chopped: Trick or Treat, Chicken Feet!
programme.desc: Halloween brings a surprise, as the chefs must make use of both candy and chicken feet.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Hidden Halloween Horrors
programme.desc: The competition begins with a deliciously difficult pre-heat as the eight Halloween bakers weave spider web desserts with creatures trapped inside.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Fall Forward Desserts
programme.desc: In the Silence of the Yams pre-heat challenge, bakers make yam desserts that evoke classic scary movie cliches from chainsaws and hockey masks to bloody knives and creepy dolls.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Strawberry to Silver Dollar
programme.desc: The Brandywine Strawberry Festival in Pennsylvania is home to 'The Colossalo,' a crab cake/roast beef combo that has host Noah Cappe going wild. Other favourites include The Sizzler, the chicken parm'wich and strawberry kettle corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Golden State to Gizzards
programme.desc: Beginning in California and ending in Michigan, Noah Cappe explores creative carnival eats like the jalapeno cheese skirt burger and deep fried gizzards.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Michigan to Maize
programme.desc: Noah gets busy with the" Soul on a Roll" sandwich, and the "To Die For" casserole. Salted caramel apple gelato is the thing to beat the heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Cornfields to Canada
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota, where he goes local with the North Woods sandwich and Barbe-chos. Then it’s across the border to the Red River Exhibition to experience a Canadian classic, prairie poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Sandwich Heroes
programme.desc: From fried bologna made fancy to bright lobster on pitch-black bread, these mild-mannered hometown standards go beyond the same-old-same-old and earning their bragging rights as sandwich heroes.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Paradise University
programme.desc: Putting on the freshmen fifteen never looked so good as diners eat their way through the tastiest college towns. From an entire Thanksgiving feast on a roll to mac 'n' cheese doughnuts, these dishes will fuel any cram session.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Motor City Deb-Olition Derby
programme.desc: Debi Mazar loves Motown, classic cars and American history, so it’s only fitting that she, Gabriele Corcos and their family stop in Detroit. The family heads over to Eastern Market where they meet with Chef Phil Jones.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Fear and Cooking in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: On the way to the Grand Canyon, Debi Mazar, Gabriele Corcos and family stop to pick local ingredients at Agritopia, eat where the locals do at Liberty Market, and attempt to fill their RV at one of the oldest gas stations around.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Cowboys Cook It Better in Texas
programme.desc: Gabriele Corcos and family drive through Texas, stopping by Snow's BBQ, the Zubik House food truck and an authentic Texas boot shop.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Seafood and Sasquatch in Seattle
programme.desc: In the Pacific Northwest, Debi Mazar, Gabriele Corcos and family are on the hunt for fresh seafood -- and Bigfoot! At the world-famous Pike Place Fish Market in Seattle, Gab tries his hand at the famous fish toss and grabs some lunch.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: The Love Boat in Portland
programme.desc: Debi Mazar and Gabriele Corcos take a weekend for themselves on the coast of Portland, Maine. For their romantic dinner on a houseboat, they pick up some lobsters, and a local snack, at a lobster shack and enjoy Maine cuisine at The Well at Jordan's Farm.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Shark Sighting on the Cape
programme.desc: Debi Mazar takes her family to the Mayflower replica in Cape Cod, Mass., to show them a piece of their family history. They also have lunch at the Sunbird Food Truck, and go on Gabriele Corcos's planned adventure -- oyster farming!

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch Americain
programme.desc: Bobby Flay takes some All-American dishes and gives them a makeover for brunch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Beach-y Keen Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby uses the brightest and boldest flavors in his Jerk Pork Belly & Sweet Potato Hash with Fried Eggs and makes Coconut Waffles with Chocolate Maple Syrup & Bananas.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Irish Style Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay showcases his Irish pride in this festive and colorful brunch menu including a bangers and egg sandwich with Irish cheddar and tomato jam, Irish-style potato pancakes with mustard-chive crème fraiche and smoked salmon.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Mexican Brunch
programme.desc: One of bobby's favourite destinations gives him the inspiration for this colorful Mexican meal. Recipes include Mexican corn pancakes and crispy breakfast potatoes with red chile lime hollandaise.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Southern Comfort Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby derives inspiration from the sweet and savoury ingredients of Southern style.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bold Southwestern Brunch
programme.desc: A Southwestern brunch includes Texas eggs benedict and cast iron home fries.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Slumber Party
programme.desc: When Bobby's daughter Sophie has a sleepover it can only mean one thing... dad's in the kitchen cooking up brunch for everyone! This fun and tasty menu starts with an apple pie oatmeal with bruleed crust that's sure to wake up your taste buds.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Southwest Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay channels his love of Southwestern cuisine for this brunch that packs a flavourful punch.

programme.title: Good Eats: Gills Gone Wild
programme.desc: Wild salmon can be a shock to the budget but host Alton Brown proves that it is worth every penny if properly and simply prepared.

programme.title: Good Eats: Hook, Line and Dinner
programme.desc: Brown finds that with three cooking methods, you can cook just about any seafood.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem For An Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: Werewolf and Demon in the Woods
programme.desc: An investigation into a strange noise brings campers face-to-face with a paranormal predator, and a group of friends stumble across evidence of a satanic ritual in the woods near their campus.

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: Cabin in the Woods and Bigfoot Encounter
programme.desc: A night of terror ensues after a couple accepts an offer to stay in an abandoned cabin in the woods, and a man is stalked by an unknown creature.

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: The Hell Hound
programme.desc: A woman encounters an uneasy presence while exploring an abandoned Ohio hospital. She quickly flees, but little does she know the entity has latched onto her and is stalking her through the woods surrounding her home.

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: Hunted By Bigfoot

programme.title: Martin: Woman With a Past

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: Home Suite Home
programme.desc: Jamie joyfully moves into his own bachelor pad, but when Fancy starts decorating it for him, he begins to feel a little crowded by her constant presence.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: Behind the Jingle
programme.desc: The pressures of being a supervisor affects the quality of Jamie's jingles, so he passes off one of Mouse's ideas as his own, which leads to a guilt-filled dream about his future.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: Partners fo' Life

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: Hot Cocoa on a Cold Evening

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder on the Mountain

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Feds vs. Outlaws

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Murderous Moms

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Killer Cop
