programme.title: Death Row Stories: Cruel and Unusual: Botched Executions
programme.desc: Lethal injection has experienced a series of botched executions in several states including Ohio, Arizona, and Oklahoma.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Murderous Moms
programme.desc: A front yard brawl between two Euclid, Ohio families leaves one person dead and investigators wondering how teenage heartbreak started it all.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.desc: A bounty hunter teams up with a mob boss's son in order to retrieve a legendary artifact.

programme.title: Movie: Brothers

programme.desc: A young woman named Belle longs to leave her tiny village. When she discovers her father is missing, she finds him as a prisoner of a Beast. She takes his place and lives at the castle, drawing closer to Beast but unaware of the approaching danger.

programme.title: Movie: Pretty Woman
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman hires a free-spirited call girl to be his companion for a week. Slowly they draw things from each other and from within themselves that make them hope against their own sceptical nature for a fairy tale ending.

programme.title: Bones: The Doctor in the Den
programme.desc: The half-eaten body of Cam's former fiancé is found in a tiger cage at the zoo, and Booth and Brennan determine the death was no accident. Meanwhile, Angela is obsessed by sexual thoughts while maintaining her self-imposed celibacy.

programme.title: Bones: The Science in the Physicist
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan are on the case when shattered, pulverized human remains are found in a garbage bag at a photo shoot. When the team discovers a meteorite shard lodged in the victim's ear, they are led to the Collar Institute of Science in D.C.

programme.title: Bones: The Cinderella in Cardboard
programme.desc: When the image of the Virgin Mary is spotted on a bale of compressed cardboard at a recycling plant, Booth and Brennan are on the scene. Upon closer inspection, they find a flattened body inside the compressed cardboard.

programme.title: Bones: Mayhem on a Cross
programme.desc: When a real human skeleton is found being used as a stage prop for a death metal band in Norway, authorities determine the victim was an American citizen. Booth and Brennan venture into the unfamiliar world of death metal music to find a killer.

programme.title: Bones: The Double Death of the Dearly Departed
programme.desc: When a Jeffersonian coworker from the Egyptology department dies of heart failure, the whole team attends the wake. Upon viewing the corpse, Brennan insists the death was no accident and enlists Booth to help her steal the body.

programme.title: Charmed: Kill Billie, Vol. 2
programme.desc: In the Underworld, Piper sees Leo's ghost and Phoebe unintentionally breaks Coop's heart. Meanwhile, the Charmed Ones and Billie and Christy realize that they must conjure The Hollow in order to defeat one another, leading to a devastating battle.

programme.title: Charmed: Forever Charmed

programme.title: Charmed: Something Wicca This Way Comes

programme.desc: A home-makeover star is sent to her hometown to renovate a historic manor. An old flame is assigned to ensure her work preserves the history of the building and the two are forced to work closely together.

programme.desc: A theologically liberal high-powered corporate executive mother with a stay-at-home husband swaps lives with a born-again Christian mother who believes women are created to be a man's helpmate.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Koopman and Early

programme.title: Wife Swap: Haigwood/ Hess-Webb

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Stolen Innocence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: E! News
programme.desc: We've got the Emmys covered from the red carpet, the fashion, and all the moments you didn't see. Plus, we're with Miley Cyrus, Christina Aguilera and all the stars at the iHeart Radio Music Festival.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux
programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Houseguest From Hell
programme.desc: Todd's home life is turned upside down when Julie’s pregnant and very demanding friend comes over to stay a few days. Also, Todd tries to bridge the gap between himself and his oldest daughter Lindsie.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Savannah's Big ID-EA
programme.desc: When an influential Southern magazine asks The Chrisleys for an interview about all things fashion, Todd insists on trying to control the situation by writing a script for his family to memorize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Life's a Pitch
programme.desc: Todd thinks that he's saving the day when he steps in to coach Grayson's baseball team, but when he discovers he's in way over his head, he must figure out a way to regain the respect (and control) of these overzealous 9 year olds.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Getting Testy
programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: 50 Shades of Faye
programme.desc: Nanny Faye joins the world of online dating. When Todd gets wind of it, he makes himself her chaperone. Meanwhile, new homeowners Chase and Savannah compete for Todd's handouts to furnish their homes.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Steamy Down Under
programme.desc: London expat Hannah and Joy hit it off and things get steamy, but not exactly where Hannah expected. Hair model and vegan Devin tries to impose his healthy lifestyle on former beauty queen Lauryn.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Twerk in Progress
programme.desc: High-spirited cheer instructor Sakoiya is searching for the well-endowed man of her dreams with Mayowa, a musician who has never cheered before. Chris is eager to find a big bootie'd girl he can twerk with.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Tased and Confused
programme.desc: Military veteran Callahan, who is obsessed with the color blue, may find love with Melissa, an accident-prone hedgehog owner with a big heart. Model Shane, and Alaia, a taser-toting swimsuit fashion designer, spend a glamorous day on a yacht at sea.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Going Down Under
programme.desc: Fitness model Sydney is ready to settle down and get serious and hopes aspiring Australian rocker Xavier has what it takes to sweep her off her feet.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Love: For Dummies
programme.desc: An aspiring puppeteer named Danny longs to woo Courtney, taking her on a bike ride and to a puppet show. Ross heads into the ring with boss Alex before going for drinks and heating things up.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Busted Blue Balls
programme.desc: A comic book nerd hopes to make a match with an ice-skating champion.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Booties and Bike Rides
programme.desc: Curvy Victoria takes a chance on package handler Jay, as the two scope out each other's physiques on the Venice Boardwalk. Glitter-loving Alexa is seemingly smitten with South African Scot, until he reveals his cherry trick.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unhappy Camper
programme.desc: Determined to fulfil one of North's lifelong dreams, Kim puts her survival skills to the test on an overnight camping trip in the wilderness. Malika heads back to Cleveland for the first time since True's birth and suspects Khloe is struggling internally.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly allows Kim to take over the annual Christmas Eve Party, but the holiday is in jeopardy when Kris learns Kim has invited an unwelcome guest. Khloe must come to the rescue when North’s beloved hamster unexpectedly dies and Kim can’t deal.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: Khole tries to mediate a fight between Kourtney and Kendall but only makes things worse. Meanwhile Kris makes herself at home in Kylie's new office space, so Kylie must show her mom who's boss.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: The one and only Jerry Springer stops by the studio to dish on his new show. Plus, we're talking 'Masked Singer' with judge Nicole Scherzinger.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All About Meme
programme.desc: The girls start to make peace with Rob's new relationship, but feelings get hurt when Rob starts making jokes on social media. Meanwhile Kris and Kim reach their breaking points as housemates and Kendall struggles with feeling left out.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fake It Til You Make It
programme.desc: Kendall, Kylie and Khloé undergo a prosthetics makeover in hopes of experiencing a 'normal' day out. Meanwhile Scott is feeling insecure about his place in the family and Kris is resistant to Corey's idea of fun.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: You Can't Handle the Truce
programme.desc: Lindsie sets up a lunch for Todd and Will so they can work out their differences. Meanwhile Savannah gives Grayson dating advice.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Review and Renew
programme.desc: Todd appoints himself director when he and the kids film a commercial for the Juice Bar. Meanwhile, Julie and Lea look into a new rejuvenation procedure.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: My Chrisley Valentine
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Chase is dating several different girls on Valentine's Day, he recruits Savannah to help teach his son a lesson about respecting women.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Go Flip Yourself
programme.desc: Todd is forced to the rescue when Chase and Parker take on a house-flipping project. Then, when Todd's childhood friend and prankster-in-crime Bill comes to visit, Julie seeks solace with Savannah.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Monster Mania
programme.desc: A monster has ransacked the kitchen and is on the loose! The bakers work together in the pre-heat challenge to create a 3-D suspect sketch out of pate a choux to help track him down.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Hallowedding
programme.desc: It's bridal season for Halloween lovers and since bridal showers often have petit fours, the bakers are creating "petit horrors" in the pre-heat challenge. In the main heat, it's time for a Halloween wedding!

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Circus of Dread
programme.desc: A group of talented bakers enter the fortune-telling tent at the circus of dread in the pre-heat challenge. The competitors are tasked with creating tarot card desserts featuring blood orange, fig or passion fruit.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Cranium Epicurean
programme.desc: Inspired by a mysterious 'skull man,' the bakers enter the graveyard to bring skull desserts to life in the pre-heat.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Halloween Invasion
programme.desc: John Henson kicks off the competition by revealing all the skeletons in his family's closet to inspire the eight bakers as they make scary skeleton desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Cake-Off: It's Alive
programme.desc: Host Duff Goldman kicks off this unconventional competition with the first challenge, in which the four bakers must create Halloween-themed cakes that incorporate a surprise selection of candies and treats.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Best of Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Comedian John Henson takes a sugar-fueled look back at some of the most outrageous moments and disgustingly delicious desserts of Halloween Baking Championship, including creepy-crawly critters, bloodiest baking and spine-tingling ingredients.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Chicken
programme.desc: It's all about chicken as Ree Drummond whips up four speedy 16-minute meals. First, her Buffalo chicken burgers are perfect when time is short and hungry teenagers are waiting.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Book and Wine Club
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, get ready for their book club! First, Beth heads to a local bookstore, where she runs into bestselling author, Ann Patchett.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Tour Favorites
programme.desc: Trisha's center stage with her backup singer, Robert Bailey! She recalls one of her favorite food stops in Portland, Ore. and creates a menu based on her experience, including filthy dirty martinis with blue cheese-stuffed olive.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Spicy Kitchen
programme.desc: After chowing down on some delicious but fiery hot chicken from Prince's Hot Chicken Shack, Trisha and her friend Julie make some spicy specialties, including chipotle peanuts and South tex-mex rice.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Seeing Double
programme.desc: Trisha celebrates her wax figure being inducted into Nashville's Madame Tussauds Wax Museum. The menu includes ingredients that are used in at least two ways, including Pork Tenderloin with Bacon Onion Jam and Apple Cider and Sautéed Apple Basmati rice.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Love For Loveless Cafe
programme.desc: One of Trisha Yearwood's favorite spots in Nashville is The Loveless Cafe. She spends the day putting a spin on her favorite dishes from the restaurant.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Mom Life
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes quick and easy recipes that let her spend more time enjoying her life as a new mom. She starts off with savory Green Pancakes for lunch, and then she's in dinner mode with a hearty Funeral Hotdish and a crunchy Romaine Salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night Out Night In
programme.desc: With the kids out on the town at a street party, Ree Drummond and Ladd enjoy a night in. They're cooking surf and turf skewers with Cajun hollandaise, a romaine wedge salad with loaded ranch dressing and rummy pineapples and cream to keep things sweet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Big House Clear Up
programme.desc: It's a big day of cleaning up the homestead with a massive bonfire to round it all off after an alfresco dinner.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Cookie Jar Spar

programme.title: The Zoo: Mending Willow
programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Dogs That Stole Our Hearts

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Golden Girl
programme.desc: Mariah faces a challenging rescue when she realizes the dog in danger is deaf. Former adopters come back to Villalobos set on adopting a special needs dog. And the rescue struggles to track down a dog's owner because of outdated microchip information.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: Across the state, Texas game wardens are busy enforcing fish and game law. An injured bald eagle needs medical attention. Game wardens go undercover to catch someone selling illegal alligator parts. A tip leads to an angler with multiple undersized fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Run and You're Done
programme.desc: It's dove season in Texas, the start of hunting season. In Beaumont, road hunters get an early start on deer season during a decoy sting. Near Texarkana, a rogue gator is lassoed. On the Gulf Coast, undersized angling means citations.

programme.title: Supernatural: Metamorphosis

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends
programme.desc: Sophia's attempts at trying to find a man go awry when a man she meets through the personals turns out to have a shadow, his sister.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Dates and a Breakup
programme.desc: Niles attends a benefit with Frasier in the hopes of meeting an eligible woman, but it is Frasier who ends up with all the attention. While Frasier juggles three dates in three days, he also has to mend his father's strained relationship with Sherry.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Dates and a Breakup
programme.desc: Niles attends a benefit with Frasier in the hopes of meeting an eligible woman, but it is Frasier who ends up with all the attention. While Frasier juggles three dates in three days, he also has to mend his father's strained relationship with Sherry.

programme.title: Frasier: Daphne Hates Sherry
programme.desc: Daphne and Sherry clash over their relationship with Martin, so Daphne stays at Niles's.

programme.title: Frasier: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Niles receives divorce papers from Maris and to show he is not as spineless as people think, he signs them immediately. Later, he begins to regret his impulsiveness and seeks counsel from Martin and Frasier.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Inferiority Complex
programme.desc: Lucy pulls one faux pas after another and develops a devastating inferiority complex.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Club Election
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are pitted against each other for the presidency of their women's club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Black Eye
programme.desc: The Mertzes won't accept Lucy's truthful explanation of how she got a black eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Changes Her Mind
programme.desc: Lucy can't seem to get dressed or order dinner at a restaurant without changing her mind.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon
programme.desc: Dorothy is contacted by a high school teacher she once had a crush on. They quickly begin seeing each other and Dorothy is convinced his feelings are genuine.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Questions and Answers
programme.desc: Dorothy desperately schemes to become a contestant on the game show Jeopardy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide VI: The Wrath of Stan
programme.desc: As associate producer of Wake Up Miami, Rose needs a hot news story for sweeps week.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Journey to the Center of Attention
programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose: Portrait of a Woman

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Hayley Orrantia from The Goldbergs and pastry chef Waylynn Lucas visit. Then, chef Charles Chen cooks fish tacos for taco Tuesday.

programme.title: Movie: Love in the Sun
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman returns to her hometown where she finds herself falling for another man. She now must decide if she wants to be with her current fiancée, or, if she wants to explore life with her new beau.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Design
programme.desc: A home-makeover star is sent to her hometown to renovate a historic manor. An old flame is assigned to ensure her work preserves the history of the building and the two are forced to work closely together.

programme.title: Movie: From Friend to Fiancé
programme.desc: A quirky girl in her early 30's has it all, except the perfect man. Her childhood BFF wants her to be the best "man" at his wedding, but after spending time together planning his wedding to her former rival, she realizes he is the one she wants.

programme.title: Lincoln: American Mastermind

programme.title: Italy's Wild Alps
programme.desc: Untamed wilderness around distinctive rocks touched by the golden glimmer of sunset: this gorgeous view could only be of the Dolomites.

programme.title: Behind Russia’s Frozen Curtain
programme.desc: Explore the stark landscape, frigid sea and wild animals in Franz Josef Land, one of the most remote and inhospitable places on Earth.

programme.title: Wild Scotland: Spring Awakening
programme.desc: Spring is the most unpredictable of all seasons in the Highlands. Red squirrels, osprey and bottlenose dolphins must make the most of the season’s fleeting opportunities.

programme.title: Wild Scotland: Mid Summer's Night Dream
programme.desc: By midsummer, the sun rules here for nearly 18 hours a day. Otters, guillemots, golden eagles and pine martens race to raise their families before the end of the Highland’s brief summer.

programme.title: Wild Scotland: Into the Woods
programme.desc: Only the toughest will survive the Highlands’ darkest and most overwhelming season. Grey seal pups, migrating Atlantic salmon, reindeer and red squirrels are pushed to the limit.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Mascot Mayhem
programme.desc: A hyper dog is made into an exemplary mascot with Cesar's help.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Why Dogs Fight
programme.desc: Cesar reveals how dogs communicate through their energy and body language, to help resolve a potentially disastrous situation.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bull-Whipped
programme.desc: Cesar travels to Santa Barbara to meet Hugo, a 3-year-old bulldog with a mean streak. After a full day with him, Cesar realizes there is no quick fix for Hugo's aggression so it's off to rehab at Cesar's Dog Psychology Center.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hounded by Fear
programme.desc: Cesar helps dog-fearing humans overcome their phobias and overcome their anxiety when they're around dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: High Anxiety
programme.desc: Cesar takes on three dogs whose obsessions have led to a disquieting life for both the canines and their owners.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Price of Freedom
programme.desc: Heimo's daughter Krin and family arrive in the refuge, but their cabin is uninhabitable.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Two Kills

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: No Regrets
programme.desc: The loss of Bob Harte is felt across the Refuge. Heimo boats to Bob's cabin to bring Bob's possessions to his family. Charlie recovers his father's shotgun from a hidden survival cache and hunts small game. Edna prepares her favorite meal, caribou head.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Hunter Is Hunted
programme.desc: As moose season opens, the hunt is on to get meat to sustain them through winter. As Charlie looks for a kill, he realizes he's being stalked by a bear. Heimo takes Krin to his best moose territory. Tyler takes to the skies to assess the fire damage.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter's Wrath
programme.desc: Tyler needs to hunt a moose to feed in family. Heimo and Scott race to get the boat off the freezing water. Bob's daughter and ex-wife return to his cab to honor his memory.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hard Choices
programme.desc: Heimo is desperate to get a moose for winter. Charlie and Tyler have to overcome fire damage on their traplines.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Never Gets Easier
programme.desc: With no meat for winter, Heimo's desperate to run his trapline, but has no choice but to hunt for moose. Tyler's plan to run his sled dog team is threatened when the pack turns on each other.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Pint-Sized Pups and a Ferret
programme.desc: A Miniature Schnauzer pup tries to befriend a high-spirited ferret. A Maltipoo pushes the boundaries set by her young parents. And, a German Shorthaired Pointer pup wants to prove the she's the ultimate hunting dog, but is shown up by a cat.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: My Pup From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson works with Sydney, a Bengal, who's welcoming his new stepmom and new pit bull brother into the family by spraying every piece of furniture in the house; an energetic cat, Stella, threatens to harm a toddler.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Gaur Move
programme.desc: Keepers introduce three gaur, a large, skittish species of cattle, to the rest of the herd. A sickly Sambar fawn is rushed to the health center. Plus, the bird department excitedly prepares for the arrival of great hornbills.

programme.title: The Zoo: Mending Willow
programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: Give a Dog a Home: Live!
programme.desc: There are thousands of animals in shelters across the U.S. in need of good, loving homes. Now Animal Planet, with Best Friends Animal Society, wants to connect these animals directly to our viewers, live and in real time.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Dogs That Stole Our Hearts
programme.desc: Tia, her kids and the extended Villalobos family reveal the behind the scenes stories of the dogs that have stolen their hearts over the years.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Golden Girl
programme.desc: Mariah faces a challenging rescue when she realizes the dog in danger is deaf. Former adopters come back to Villalobos set on adopting a special needs dog. And the rescue struggles to track down a dog's owner because of outdated microchip information.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: Across the state, Texas game wardens are busy enforcing fish and game law. An injured bald eagle needs medical attention. Game wardens go undercover to catch someone selling illegal alligator parts. A tip leads to an angler with multiple undersized fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Run and You're Done
programme.desc: It's dove season in Texas, the start of hunting season. In Beaumont, road hunters get an early start on deer season during a decoy sting. Near Texarkana, a rogue gator is lassoed. On the Gulf Coast, undersized angling means citations.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Nichols
programme.desc: Suffering from loneliness while living in the isolated Rocky Mountains, Dan and Don Nichols kidnap a local female and try to convince her to become Dan's bride.

programme.title: Female Forces: Cry Me a River
programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Comes to My Dreams
programme.desc: When Gwen Bailey married Norman Starnes she counted herself lucky to land the most eligible bachelor in town. But years later, she discovered she never really knew him at all. And by the time she finally realized, she was already his unwilling accomplice.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Secrets You Keep
programme.desc: Brittney Cosby and Crystal Jackson are an ambitious couple living in Houston, Texas. When their lifeless bodies are found near a dumpster, authorities comb through the evidence until the shocking identity of their killer is revealed.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Murder is a Filthy Business
programme.desc: A well-intentioned social worker goes missing after becoming involved with two sisters raising children in a trash-ridden house.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Two adopted sisters are inseparable until the social pressures of high school and bullying drive a wedge of violence between them.

programme.desc: In Logan, Ohio, investigators receive word someone has been kidnapped from their job at the bank driven off in a car that resembles a police cruiser. Eventually, detectives discover a very personal connection between the victim and the kidnappers.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Darkness Before Don
programme.desc: The Blue Ridge Mountains of North Carolina make a perfect backdrop--for murder. Pillars of the community are pulled into a nightmare when affairs, abuse and embezzlement lead to someone losing their head.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Black Pearl
programme.desc: Tammy Ellis likes bad boys and charismatic loner David Gatlin is right up her street. After a quickie marriage, David's dark history is revealed; an attempted divorce is the catalyst for a terrifying and bloody confrontation.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death in the Family
programme.desc: Kraig and Karen Kahler enjoyed a life of influence and privilege, but sexual obsession spun out of control and destroyed everything.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder, Modesty, and the Pastor
programme.desc: Corinne isn't a demanding woman - she just wants what many lonely people want: a second chance at love. And when she meets Calvin Stoudt she finally gets it. But a too-close roommate and a monstrous past turn this second chance into a deadly battleground.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love of Money
programme.desc: These Deadly Women sacrificed their loved ones to satisfy their 'Love of Money.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mom's Money
programme.desc: Most children value their mother's enduring love, but few are only concerned with a different kind of maternal support: money. These Deadly Women prove all they care about is ''Mom's Money''.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Leaves Town
programme.desc: With hearts of stone, these Deadly Women give their men special send-offs when 'Love Leaves Town.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover Makes Three
programme.desc: Sometimes the love of one person isn't satisfying.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: In Bellevue, Washington, a teenager is found slain in a local park. As those closest to the victim lead investigators down the rabbit hole, a conspiracy is slowly unearthed, revealing this victim isn't the only one with a target on her back.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Dead Lift
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, five teenagers work out constantly to reach their peak physiques. But when the crew's strongest member is found dead and buried in the desert, his best friends become suspects in the murder.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: In Bellevue, Washington, a teenager is found slain in a local park. As those closest to the victim lead investigators down the rabbit hole, a conspiracy is slowly unearthed, revealing this victim isn't the only one with a target on her back.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Ride with the Devil
programme.desc: 26-year-old car dealer Christopher O'Brien takes a strange man for a test drive and never returns. Did O'Brien's criminal past finally catch up with him? Or is the truth something more sinister?

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill it's Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Bill Doolin and The Oklahombres
programme.desc: In the 1890s, the Frontier had vanished, but in Bill Doolin, its spirit burned on. He terrorized Oklahoma with his brazen robberies and fought the greatest shootout in Western history.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Lighter Than Air: First to Fly

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Tales of Sea and Sky
programme.desc: We expose the truth behind the history on the high seas and we take wing to separate myth from truth about the nation's pioneering aviators.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: The Great Escape
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we uncover the real facts behind two legendary battles waged on American soil and we put the spotlight on great showmen to separate myth from truth.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Discovering America
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the men who discovered the New World and take a trip to discover the real facts behind the most famous bridge and road in America.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.desc: A baby boomer couple fell in love later in life but are young at heart seeking a home that will fit their active lifestyle.

programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take Kelsey and Trip Purks on a tour through three classic homes in the historic Dean Highland neighborhood of Waco, Texas.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: After Recent Adoption, Family Finds Space to Thrive

programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.desc: A couple that moved from Hawaii to take care of a family member in Texas wants to recreate their outdoor lanai lifestyle. Justin McGuire and Steve Terry must use everything they have to turn their rocky Austin hilltop into a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Broken to Beautiful
programme.desc: After living with a broken pool for four years, a family decides to build their dream pool again. Brian and Paul Porter give them an out-of-this-world creation, featuring a waterfall wall, sunken fire pit and poolside spa.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Sight Unseen: Open Kitchen
programme.desc: The kitchen was originally designed as a place for servants to work and eat, but Wes and Carre remodel it to make it functional for modern-day use.

programme.title: Docked Out: Driftwood Dock: Custom Waterfront Living
programme.desc: The crew builds a massive two-storey dock that incorporates elements of the existing home and the river itself. The crew also builds a swim step, one-of-a-kind furniture made from driftwood pieces and a custom upper level with a view.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: With an upcoming move fast approaching, a couple with three boys needs to put their home on the market as soon as possible. Their sloped yard and aging features aren't helping, so Chris and Sara stretch their bucket to get the value up.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Greek Revival Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs preserve a Greek Rival farm house in Bentleyville, Pennsylvania. Main salvage items include mantles, tiles and a full-sized chicken coop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Pickle Mansion
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs head to Knoxville, Tennessee, in hopes of salvaging the crumbling Pickle Mansion. The main items of interest are a copper frieze and columns. Mike discovers a fuel drop tank and he and Tay build a dresser kitchen island.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Free Will House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawg team travels to Free Will House in Huntington, West Virginia, where they salvage a bathtub, sitz bath and kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Grace Family Church
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew travels to Vinton, Virginia, in order to salvage a massive piece of stained glass from the Grace Family Church. They run into challenges when equipment is delayed.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Texas Tavern Sign
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work at home in Roanoke, Virginia, where they salvage a sign for the Texas Tavern and learn the history of the local restaurant over burgers and bowls of chili.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Blacksburg Barn
programme.desc: The dawgs head to Blacksburg, Virginia, to salvage an 1800s barn with an internal log structure. It should be an easy job, but a hurricane on the horizon means a tighter deadline to make it out before the storm arrives.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Storefront
programme.desc: The crew take a stab at a refurbished storefront in historic downtown Lexington, Virginia. This second-generation salvage requires a lot of finesse, as the building is being renovated rather than destroyed. Windowpanes become a room divider.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Barnesville House
programme.desc: The dawgs tackle Ohio's cold and snowy winter to salvage an old Italiante house that's beaming with character. Back in the shop, things heat up as Tay comes up with a plan to use old pulleys as the legs for a unique table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Dayton Mill Power Plant
programme.desc: The team organizes a dawg vs. dawg build competition after Mike and Robert get a tip on an abandoned power plant from an old client in South Carolina. The winner of the contest is a tough call as both teams' pieces are rooted in the original aesthetic.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Timberville House
programme.desc: The dawgs salvage a 1900s farmhouse in the heart of the Shenandoah Valley. Along with the usual doors and hardware, they find ornate ceiling medallions, a clawfoot tub and pine flooring. A built-in cabinet yields a potential treasure.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Cap Centre
programme.desc: The crew take a second stab at the Boulevard at Capital Centre. This time, they bring home finds from a Japanese restaurant, a bank and a spa, including shoji screens and bullet-resistant plexiglass. Back home they complete a build for a dear friend.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bluefield House
programme.desc: The crew deliver a large lamppost that will serve as the focal point of a new community space. Before taking on this project, the team visits the Bluefield House in West Virginia to find classic commodities needed to restock the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Alexandria Church
programme.desc: The crew go to salvage a church where they must save everything from contemporary pews to a commercial grade sink. However, the team must get creative as they are met with heights, narrow hallways and perplexing waterlines.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Barnesville
programme.desc: The crew pick through a barn and take on a Queen Anne-style home in Barnesville, Ohio, looking for some bonus finds. Mike Whiteside meets with a return client who has an idea for a dining table set made from canning baskets and live edge wood.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Baltimore Fireboat
programme.desc: After a call from their old friend, Captain Tim, the crew travels to Norfolk, Virginia, to salvage a fireboat from Baltimore. When they return to the shop, Mike and Tay enlist the help of a local coppersmith to fashion unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Boulevard at Capital Centre
programme.desc: The crew get a huge opportunity in suburban Washington, D.C. where they work on the former site of the Capital Centre. The arena was demolished in 2002, but is just now being redeveloped. Later, Tay builds a breakfast table out of a car engine.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Laverock Hill Estate
programme.desc: The crew heads to Glenside, PA to salvage a huge estate. The sprawling mansion gives the Dawgs a run for their money as they try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more. Mike and Tay visit Rural Retreat to find a piece for a coffee table.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Monster Mania
programme.desc: A monster has ransacked the kitchen and is on the loose! The bakers work together in the pre-heat challenge to create a 3-D suspect sketch out of pate a choux to help track him down.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Hallowedding
programme.desc: It's bridal season for Halloween lovers and since bridal showers often have petit fours, the bakers are creating "petit horrors" in the pre-heat challenge. In the main heat, it's time for a Halloween wedding!

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Circus of Dread
programme.desc: A group of talented bakers enter the fortune-telling tent at the circus of dread in the pre-heat challenge. The competitors are tasked with creating tarot card desserts featuring blood orange, fig or passion fruit.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Cranium Epicurean
programme.desc: Inspired by a mysterious 'skull man,' the bakers enter the graveyard to bring skull desserts to life in the pre-heat.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Halloween Invasion
programme.desc: John Henson kicks off the competition by revealing all the skeletons in his family's closet to inspire the eight bakers as they make scary skeleton desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Cake-Off: It's Alive
programme.desc: Host Duff Goldman kicks off this unconventional competition with the first challenge, in which the four bakers must create Halloween-themed cakes that incorporate a surprise selection of candies and treats.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Best of Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Comedian John Henson takes a sugar-fueled look back at some of the most outrageous moments and disgustingly delicious desserts of Halloween Baking Championship, including creepy-crawly critters, bloodiest baking and spine-tingling ingredients.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Book and Wine Club
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, get ready for their book club! First, Beth heads to a local bookstore, where she runs into bestselling author, Ann Patchett.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Tour Favorites
programme.desc: Trisha's center stage with her backup singer, Robert Bailey! She recalls one of her favorite food stops in Portland, Ore. and creates a menu based on her experience, including filthy dirty martinis with blue cheese-stuffed olive.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Spicy Kitchen
programme.desc: After chowing down on some delicious but fiery hot chicken from Prince's Hot Chicken Shack, Trisha and her friend Julie make some spicy specialties, including chipotle peanuts and South tex-mex rice.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Seeing Double
programme.desc: Trisha celebrates her wax figure being inducted into Nashville's Madame Tussauds Wax Museum. The menu includes ingredients that are used in at least two ways, including Pork Tenderloin with Bacon Onion Jam and Apple Cider and Sautéed Apple Basmati rice.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Love For Loveless Cafe
programme.desc: One of Trisha Yearwood's favorite spots in Nashville is The Loveless Cafe. She spends the day putting a spin on her favorite dishes from the restaurant.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Mom Life
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes quick and easy recipes that let her spend more time enjoying her life as a new mom. She starts off with savory Green Pancakes for lunch, and then she's in dinner mode with a hearty Funeral Hotdish and a crunchy Romaine Salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night Out Night In
programme.desc: With the kids out on the town at a street party, Ree Drummond and Ladd enjoy a night in. They're cooking surf and turf skewers with Cajun hollandaise, a romaine wedge salad with loaded ranch dressing and rummy pineapples and cream to keep things sweet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Big House Clear Up
programme.desc: It's a big day of cleaning up the homestead with a massive bonfire to round it all off after an alfresco dinner.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: You Wanna 'Pizza' Me?
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli challenges four chefs to think outside of the pizza box as they stake out shoppers at Bristol Farms market in Calabasas, California.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Cookie Jar Spar
programme.desc: The appetizer baskets include pickle-flavoured cotton candy. In the second round, they must dip into cookie jars to discover sweet ingredients for their entrees, including guest Nikki Bella.

programme.title: Chopped: Offal Surprise
programme.desc: The chefs set out to use ramen in a creative way for their appetizer. Then in the entree round, an offal surprise is a source of stress for the competitors.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Green Bay, Wisconsin
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the best eats brings him to Green Bay, Wis. He gets into the tailgate tradition with a green-and-gold burger piled high with bratwurst, cheese curds and jalapenos.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Cheat Day
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson gears up for his favourite day of the week- cheat day! It's a full-on sugar and carb overload with everything from cakes to shakes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Desserts to Die For
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the most delectable, distinctive and to-die-for dessert dishes around. They have the power to take diners back in time, back home or even to places they've never been before.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Superstuffed
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares a day's worth of foods that are jam-packed, crammed full and super stuffed with the tastiest, most delicious flavors imaginable.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Southern Comforts Are Just Around the Corner
programme.desc: Southern food gets schooled when Damaris Phillips and NASCAR personality Rutledge Wood.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Biloxi's Big Eats
programme.desc: In a city like Biloxi, Mississippi, it's a must to indulge in all the fresh seafood fished daily from the gulf so Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood waste no time settling in.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Smokey Mountain Majesty
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood continue their tour in Knoxville, Tennessee, a city that insists on using only the freshest regional ingredients for its spectacular Southern cuisine.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: A Whole Beast of Flavor
programme.desc: Damaris Phillips and NASCAR personality Rutledge Wood sop up the sauce in Charleston, S.C., as they discover the pleasures of whole hog barbecue with legendary pitmaster, Rodney Scott. Then they are on to one of the best burgers in America.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Chattanooga Chew
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood shift their food tour into high gear exploring stunning Chattanooga, Tennessee.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Bring It On, Birmingham!
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood are sold on Birmingham, Alabama's, Southern hospitality and amazing eats! At the charming 1950s hot dog shop Gus's Hot Dogs, the duo feasts on a spicy wiener packed with decidedly Southern flavors and spices.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big Sky, Big Game, Big Flavor!
programme.desc: Ali's expedition for the best deals in Bozeman, Mont., begins with farm-to-table fresh benedict and summer sausage before hunting down a made-from-scratch elk burger.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mountain Feast
programme.desc: Ali hits the Jackson Hole, Wyo., trail running for a delicious croque madame with mornay sauce in the morning and crosses the Snake River for a crunchy fried chicken banh mi sandwich.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Crossroad Foodie
programme.desc: Ali paves the way in Salt Lake City with a zesty pound cake-inspired French toast, then gets wasted on a burger topped with fried guacamole. A biker bar sends him to heaven with a Utah staple, fried Mormon funeral potatoes.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Great Lakes Craves
programme.desc: Ali Kahn digs into the best deals in Grand Rapids with a twilight French toast glistening with creamy anglaise sauce. For lunch, it's a Mexican fiesta with layers of juicy pork torta de jamon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Ali Khan has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Minneapolis for breakfast, lunch, a snack and dinner! Join him on this sweet and savory ride in his search for some of best deals on the best meals in Minneapolis!

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Louisville, KY., by cutting into a towering stack of thick hot chocolate pancakes. Lunchtime in Louisville means a saucy Mata Hari hot brown.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: All Aboard In Chat-Town
programme.desc: Ali Khan is looking for the best deals in Chattanooga, starting with a glorious colossal cinnamon roll before he digs into an out-of-this-world sweet and sassy lamb burger for lunch.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Culinary Cornhuskers
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his Omaha food adventure with breakfast from a fast made-from-scratch joint offering a crazy good egg boat with hash browns. For lunch, Ali tips his hat to an iconic Omaha lunch with a housemade Reuben.

programme.title: Good Eats: What's Up Duck?
programme.desc: Alton ponders thermodynamics as he makes duck in his quest to make duck a regular dish.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fowl Territory
programme.desc: Alton shares his favourite weeknight meal, Cornish game hen, with an eye on food safety. From the grocery store to the leftovers, he shows how to shop, prep, cook, and even grill while providing guidelines and tools for proper food handling and clean up.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roadside 'Cue
programme.desc: While road-tripping through Texas, Roger Mooking pulls the car over for some seriously delicious barbecue. In San Antonio, he makes a pit stop at The Box Street Social food truck to hang chickens and racks of ribs over a live fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoked Out
programme.desc: Where there's fire, there's smoke, and some of the most flavourful meat on the market.

programme.title: Demon House: The Lost Footage
programme.desc: Zak Bagans investigates a home he purchased sight unseen in Gary, Indiana, after learning about its demonic history.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Goatman's Bridge
programme.desc: The Ghost Adventures crew is in Denton, Texas, investigating Goatman's Bridge. They learn about satanic worship underneath the bridge and hear stories from four women who were physically attacked by a demonic entity.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Ogden Possession
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to Ogden, Utah, to help a family plagued by a demonic figure that appears as a beautiful red-headed girl.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Phelps Dodge Hospital
programme.desc: The crew investigates an abandoned Arizona hospital where the caretaker is being choked by a dark presence. A strange conflict arises between Zak and Aaron after objects are thrown at the guys and a violent threat is captured on EVP.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Spine-Chilling Southwest
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate extraterrestrial activity at the Stardust Ranch in Buckeye, Arizona. They then return to the Washoe Club in Virginia City, Nevada, where a highly personal communication brings the guys to tears.

programme.title: Strange World: Overlords
programme.desc: Independent filmmaker Christopher Garetano takes a close look at the ever-increasing world of automation as he investigates whether artificial intelligence will become humanity's greatest ally or its biggest biggest existential threat.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Beyond the Limit
programme.desc: Josh shares hilarious bonus moments from his season four adventures, from the good and the bad to the downright weird.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: World's 8th Wonder
programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Josh hunts down new evidence on the iconic disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He first treks to uncharted tribal lands of PNG, then ends his journey in Fiji hoping to uncover the human remains of Amelia.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: About Time
programme.desc: From a cursed clock in Prague to a death-defying rescue in the snowy Sierra Nevada Mountains, Josh Gates explores six legendary locations that have withstood the test of time.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: From a Spanish Inquisition stronghold of sadism to a haunted theater in Memphis, Tennessee, Josh explores six locations where flesh and blood were shed, but the dead are not forgotten.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Out of This World
programme.desc: Josh shares five locations where the natural and supernatural worlds can be explored, including a haunted asylum in upstate New York and an underground cathedral built entirely of salt in Poland.

programme.title: Josh Gates' Destination Truth: Israeli Ruins and Irish Leprechauns
programme.desc: Josh traverses the globe to spend the night among the mysterious Masada ruins in Israel where locals say terrifying sounds are heard. Then, Josh and his team search far and wide for any proof of leprechauns living in Ireland.

programme.title: Josh Gates' Destination Truth: Fiji Mysteries and the Filipino Terror
programme.desc: Josh travels to Fiji to investigate reports of strange noises and unexplained figures at a village once home to a cannibal tribe. Then, he journeys through the Philippines on the hunt for a primate-like monster living in the jungle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bionic Bride
programme.desc: Crystal and her sisters have some severe sibling rivalry. Will she be able to rise above it to find the perfect dress? Rebekah is known as the bionic model because of her prosthetic arm. Randy makes it his mission to find her a dress.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Walking a Tight Rope
programme.desc: Deavan's arrival in South Korea is not as she expected. Ronald's gambling addiction causes issues with Tiffany. Paul tries to get back in Karine's good graces before she goes into labour. Corey receives shocking news. Jenny's daughter confronts Sumit.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Fool's gold
programme.desc: Jihoon reveals a huge secret about his past to Deavan. Jenny and Sumit's relationship reaches a boiling point. Paul and Karine become parents. Tensions build when Laura's son arrives in Tunisia and meets Aladin.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: More to Love: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Jenny is devastated when she hears shocking news about Sumit. Laura is torn between Liam and Aladin. Corey is conflicted about returning to Evelin in Ecuador. Paul's mother arrives in Brazil. Tiffany is traumatized about giving birth in South Africa.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Torn
programme.desc: Sumit reveals his truth. Deavan discovers more troubling information about Jihoon's past. Corey returns to Ecuador with less than a month on his visa to convince Evelin to wed. Liam gives Aladin an ultimatum.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Pillow Talk: True Colors
programme.desc: Rebecca learns the result of Zied's background check. Avery delivers some devastating news to her mom. Benjamin finally meets Akinyi's father. Angela and Michael try to make amends. Darcey and Tom's relationship takes an interesting turn in Albania.

programme.title: Unexpected: The Sperm IS The Baby
programme.desc: Rosa and Rebecca finally meet at Rilah's baby shower. Tyra isn't comfortable visiting Alex's family with Alex and the baby. McKayla goes to the hospital to be induced. Jessica and Nate find out Chloe and Max broke their only rule.

programme.desc: Aspyn goes wedding dress shopping but after the fun, Kody drops a huge bombshell. With a weird whiteboard presentation, he tells his wives they need to sell their houses and move. Janelle digs in her heels. She's not going to do this to her kids.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: A Mother's Day Surprise
programme.desc: Courtney struggles to split her time between the babies and the older boys. Eric takes on more work to keep up with new expenses. The family attempts their first public outing with the sextuplets on Mother's Day and soon face one of their biggest fears.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Busby Birthday Bash
programme.desc: The Busbys throw a joint birthday party for the girls and Danielle also plans individual birthday adventures. Adam's job could make him miss the event, putting him in an awkward spot. A familiar guest scares the girls at the Busby Easter celebration.

programme.title: The Little Couple: Wait, They Are Cutting You Open?
programme.desc: The family is headed to New York City for Jen's hip replacement surgery. They try to make the best of their trip by enjoying the chilly Christmas season, but it ends in uncertainty as Jen is wheeled into the OR.

programme.title: The Little Couple: Let's Have a Bravo to Dad!
programme.desc: Jen's quickly recovering from surgery and the family is able to head back home in time for Christmas. Back home, Bill juggles taking care of the kids and helping Jen. Jen thinks she's ready to return to work, but Bill's concerned she's pushing her luck.

programme.title: The Little Couple: This Is How a Dude Does It
programme.desc: Jen is recovering from surgery amidst the business of everyday life in the family. Bill and Will prepare for a Derby contest which is great father/ son bonding but the pressure is on to win. Jen isn't able to participate so she and Zoey take a spa day.

programme.title: The Little Couple: It's a Real Pirate!
programme.desc: Everyone prepares to celebrate Will's ninth birthday as well as his gotcha day, the anniversary of his adoption. The family heads to the Grand Prix races and celebrate Will's ninth by setting off on a pirate ship.

programme.title: The Little Couple: Surprise!
programme.desc: It's Jen's birthday and Bill recruits the kids to help plan a surprise party. They decide to make her one-of-a-kind handmade gifts while Jen and her parents take a stroll down memory lane by visiting her childhood home.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Take This Job and Stew It
programme.desc: Hannah and Conrad re-evaluate whether their opposite outlooks on life will be able to coexist off the boat. Brooke and Kasey start to air their grievances over Hannah's work ethic, while Jamie's hard work gets recognition.

programme.desc: Hannah and Joao's contempt for one another grows even stronger when Joao ruffles Hannah's feathers. On the first day of charter, strong winds leave the boat stuck at the dock. Hannah's leadership skills are challenged by Brooke and Kasey.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!
programme.desc: Ben is determined to regain his sea legs, but Sirocco's faulty galley has other plans. Travis' latest drunken night has Sandy at the end of her rope. Jack ups his romance game by writing poetry for Aesha.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Sweet White Glove O' Mine
programme.desc: The charter guests request a White Party for their final dinner, and Ben goes to great lengths in creating a menu for the theme. Joao's ego gets him in hot water with Captain Sandy, while Jack enlists the crew to help him ask Aesha to be his girlfriend.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Love, Love Me Stew
programme.desc: The crew prepares for the final chapter of the season, and with Joao sidelined with a fever, Travis is forced to step up. Bad weather rolls into the south of France leaving Sirocco stuck at the dock, adding more pressure on the interior team to perform.

programme.desc: Follow five women through their glamorous lives with their families in a gated community.

programme.desc: Motor yacht Sirocco braces for its most exclusive charter guest yet: The Queen of Versailles. João faces his old demons after a drunken night out as well as an increasingly defiant deck crew. A new third stew joins the boat who has Colin swooning.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Bizarre Love Triangle

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Panic at the Deck-o
programme.desc: Joao solidifies the love triangle, leaving Kasey confused. On the crew day off, Hannah feels slighted by Brooke when she pursues a relationship with Joao. Meanwhile, Adam gets ready for his chance at redemption as he goes foraging for food.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Hannah, Hannah, Sandy?
programme.desc: With both Hannah and Jamie down, Captain Sandy steps in to support her crew. Adam feels like his chance at redemption is foiled when charter guest Kenny requests an impromptu beach picnic.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Mo' Euros, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Captain Sandy's patience is tested when Hannah disobeys a direct order. Meanwhile, Adam concentrates on delivering another onion-less dinner to complete his redemption with charter guests Kenny and Amber.

programme.desc: Hannah confronts Kasey and Brooke about the hierarchy of the interior. The primary charter guest asks the crew to participate in a trust exercise involving arrows that leaves everyone concerned for their safety. Adam not cooking finally comes to a head.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: One Million Percent
programme.desc: Adam rises to the occasion with his crew meals putting all the chatter to rest. And, on the final charter of the season, a group of self-proclaimed 'Daddy’s Girls,' come on board, but the stews sense awkward tension with Daddy's girlfriend.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Definitely Not Prague
programme.desc: On the season finale, the Talisman crew pull out all the stops to end the season on a high note. Hannah picks a fight with Joao and Brooke, causing Brooke to fight back. Adam delivers a final dinner that leaves guests speechless.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Who's the Boss?
programme.desc: Another charter season in the Mediterranean gets under way as the crew of the luxury yacht Sirocco sets sail in the waters off the spectacular coast of Croatia. Returning crew Hannah and Bobby are joined by seven new shipmates this time around.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: E! News
programme.desc: We've got the Emmys covered from the red carpet, the fashion, and all the moments you didn't see. Plus, we're with Miley Cyrus, Christina Aguilera and all the stars at the iHeart Radio Music Festival.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux
programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Houseguest From Hell
programme.desc: Todd's home life is turned upside down when Julie’s pregnant and very demanding friend comes over to stay a few days. Also, Todd tries to bridge the gap between himself and his oldest daughter Lindsie.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Savannah's Big ID-EA
programme.desc: When an influential Southern magazine asks The Chrisleys for an interview about all things fashion, Todd insists on trying to control the situation by writing a script for his family to memorize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Life's a Pitch
programme.desc: Todd thinks that he's saving the day when he steps in to coach Grayson's baseball team, but when he discovers he's in way over his head, he must figure out a way to regain the respect (and control) of these overzealous 9 year olds.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Getting Testy
programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: 50 Shades of Faye
programme.desc: Nanny Faye joins the world of online dating. When Todd gets wind of it, he makes himself her chaperone. Meanwhile, new homeowners Chase and Savannah compete for Todd's handouts to furnish their homes.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.desc: Military veteran Callahan, who is obsessed with the color blue, may find love with Melissa, an accident-prone hedgehog owner with a big heart. Model Shane, and Alaia, a taser-toting swimsuit fashion designer, spend a glamorous day on a yacht at sea.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Going Down Under
programme.desc: Fitness model Sydney is ready to settle down and get serious and hopes aspiring Australian rocker Xavier has what it takes to sweep her off her feet.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Love: For Dummies
programme.desc: An aspiring puppeteer named Danny longs to woo Courtney, taking her on a bike ride and to a puppet show. Ross heads into the ring with boss Alex before going for drinks and heating things up.

programme.desc: Curvy Victoria takes a chance on package handler Jay, as the two scope out each other's physiques on the Venice Boardwalk. Glitter-loving Alexa is seemingly smitten with South African Scot, until he reveals his cherry trick.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Stolen Innocence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Murderous Moms
programme.desc: A front yard brawl between two Euclid, Ohio families leaves one person dead and investigators wondering how teenage heartbreak started it all.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew

programme.desc: During an overnight camping trip, the kids must use their survival skills after Emma and Xander get lost in a cave.

programme.desc: When Jessie needs some extra money for a gift, she accepts a job out of desperation.

programme.desc: Though it was hard at first, Teddy finally manages to buy Gracie, a beloved used car, from Ivy's dad. However, when it gets wrecked almost immediately, Teddy hosts a 'car funeral' to celebrate the life of Gracie so Harry can get some closure and move on.
